     1	import { createClient } from '@/utils/supabase/server'
     2	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
     3	import { resolveClientFromUser } from '@/lib/client/resolve-client'
     4	import { resolveClientTimezone } from '@/lib/client/checkin/resolveClientTimezone'
     5	import { utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/client/checkin/timeWindows'
     6	import { computePhysiologicalDate } from '@/lib/nutrition/physiological-date'
     7	import { computeNutritionAlerts } from '@/lib/client/smart/nutritionAlerts'
     8	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
     9	import type { NutritionMeal } from '@/lib/nutrition/food-items'
    10	import type { SmartNutritionPrep } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList'
    11	import type { GenericAlert } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartAlertsFeed'
    12	import { type ClientLang } from '@/lib/i18n/clientTranslations'
    13	import { computeMacroEnergy } from '@/lib/nutrition/energy'
    14	import { resolveProtocolDayByDate, resolveRestProtocolDay } from '@/lib/nutrition/protocol-schedule'
    15	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from '@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors'
    16	import { detectCurrentPhase, getCycleSyncAdjustment } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
    17	import type { CyclePhase, CycleSyncAdjustment } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
    18	import { getCycleStateFromLogs } from '@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine'
    19	import type { CycleState, CycleLog } from '@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine'
    20	import NutritionClientPage from './NutritionClientPage'

    23	type SearchParams = { date?: string }
    24	
    25	function inferTrainingDay(protocolDay: Record<string, unknown> | null): boolean {
    26	  if (!protocolDay) return false
    27	  const name = String(protocolDay.name ?? '').toLowerCase()
    28	  const cycle = String(protocolDay.carb_cycle_type ?? '').toLowerCase()
    29	  return (
    30	    name.includes('entraînement') ||
    31	    name.includes('entrainement') ||
    32	    name.includes('training') ||
    33	    cycle.includes('high')
    34	  )
    35	}
    36	
    37	function svc() {
    38	  return createServiceClient(
    39	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    40	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    41	  )
    42	}
    43	
    44	export default async function ClientNutritionPage({ searchParams }: { searchParams: SearchParams }) {
    45	  const supabase = createClient()
    46	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    47	  if (!user) return null
    48	
    49	  const client = await resolveClientFromUser(user.id, user.email, svc(), 'id, gender')
    50	  if (!client) return null
    51	  const isFemale = (client as { gender?: string | null }).gender === 'female'
    52	  const timezone = await resolveClientTimezone(svc(), client.id)
    53	
    54	  const date = searchParams.date ?? computePhysiologicalDate(new Date(), timezone)
    55	  const { start: physiologicalStart, end: physiologicalEnd } = utcRangeForPhysiologicalDate(date, timezone)
    56	  const clientId = client.id
    57	
    58	  // ── Parallel fetches (all direct Supabase, no loopback HTTP) ──────────────
    59	  const [protoResult, mealsResult, prepsResult, waterResult, weightResult, checkinWeightResult, trendResult, streakResult, prefsResult, cycleResult, cycleLogsResult, dayOverrideResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
    60	    svc()
    61	      .from('nutrition_protocols')
    62	      .select('cycle_sync_enabled, tdee_adaptive, tdee_data_source, schedule_start_date, nutrition_protocol_days(position, name, calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, hydration_ml, carb_cycle_type, cycle_sync_phase, recommendations), nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots(week_index, dow, protocol_day_position)')
    63	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    64	      .eq('status', 'shared')
    65	      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
    66	      .limit(1)
    67	      .maybeSingle(),
    68	
    69	    // Meals with full entries for the journal list
    70	    svc()
    71	      .from('nutrition_meals')
    72	      .select(`
    73	        id, meal_type, title, logged_at, physiological_date,
    74	        total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g,
    75	        photo_urls, notes,
    76	        nutrition_entries (
    77	          id, quantity_g, calories_kcal, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, fiber_g,
    78	          input_mode, confidence_score,
    79	          food_items (id, name_fr, category_l1, item_key, kcal_per_100g)
    80	        )
    81	      `)
    82	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    83	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    84	      .neq('meal_type', 'drinks')
    85	      .order('logged_at', { ascending: true }),
    86	
    87	    svc()
    88	      .from('client_nutrition_preps')
    89	      .select('id, physiological_date, title, meal_type, meal_slot, variant_group_id, scenario_key, scenario_label, is_active, status, entries, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g, total_fiber_g, planned_for, created_at, updated_at')
    90	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    91	      .eq('physiological_date', date)
    92	      .eq('status', 'planned')
    93	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false }),
    94	
    95	    svc()
    96	      .from('client_water_logs')
    97	      .select('amount_ml, caffeine_mg, logged_at')
    98	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
    99	      .gte('logged_at', physiologicalStart.toISOString())
   100	      .lte('logged_at', physiologicalEnd.toISOString()),
   101	
   102	    // Latest body weight from assessments
   103	    svc()
   104	      .from('assessment_responses')
   105	      .select('numeric_value')
   106	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   107	      .eq('field_key', 'weight_kg')
   108	      .not('numeric_value', 'is', null)
   109	      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   110	      .limit(1)
   111	      .maybeSingle(),
   112	
   113	    // Latest body weight from client check-ins (preferred when available)
   114	    svc()
   115	      .from('client_daily_checkins')
   116	      .select('weight_kg')
   117	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   118	      .not('weight_kg', 'is', null)
   119	      .order('date', { ascending: false })
   120	      .limit(1)
   121	      .maybeSingle(),
   122	
   123	    // Weekly trend: last 7 days — full macros for grid
   124	    (async () => {
   125	      const today = new Date()
   126	      const days: string[] = []
   127	      for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
   128	        const d = new Date(today)
   129	        d.setDate(today.getDate() - i)
   130	        days.push(d.toISOString().slice(0, 10))
   131	      }
   132	      return svc()
   133	        .from('nutrition_meals')
   134	        .select('physiological_date, total_calories, total_protein_g, total_carbs_g, total_fat_g')
   135	        .eq('client_id', clientId)
   136	        .neq('meal_type', 'drinks')
   137	        .in('physiological_date', days)
   138	    })(),
   139	
   140	    // 90-day logged dates for streak + calendar
   141	    (async () => {
   142	      const d90ago = new Date()
   143	      d90ago.setDate(d90ago.getDate() - 89)
   144	      const from90 = d90ago.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
   145	      return svc()
   146	        .from('nutrition_meals')
   147	        .select('physiological_date')
   148	        .eq('client_id', clientId)
   149	        .neq('meal_type', 'drinks')
   150	        .gte('physiological_date', from90)
   151	        .order('physiological_date', { ascending: true })
   152	    })(),
   153	
   154	    // Client language preference
   155	    svc()
   156	      .from('client_preferences')
   157	      .select('language')
   158	      .eq('client_id', clientId)
   159	      .maybeSingle(),
   160	
   161	    // Last period date for cycle sync (female only)
   162	    // assessment_responses has no client_id — join via assessment_submissions
   163	    isFemale
   164	      ? (async () => {
   165	          const { data: subs } = await svc()
   166	            .from('assessment_submissions')
   167	            .select('id')
   168	            .eq('client_id', clientId)
   169	            .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false })
   170	            .limit(3)
   171	          const subIds = (subs ?? []).map((s: { id: string }) => s.id)
   172	          if (subIds.length === 0) return { data: null, error: null }
   173	          return svc()
   174	            .from('assessment_responses')
   175	            .select('value_text, numeric_value')
   176	            .eq('field_key', 'menstrual_cycle')
   177	            .in('submission_id', subIds)
   178	            .not('value_text', 'is', null)
   179	            .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   180	            .limit(1)
   181	            .maybeSingle()
   182	        })()
   183	      : Promise.resolve({ data: null, error: null }),
   184	
   185	    // Cycle logs for gold-standard engine (female only)
   186	    isFemale
   187	      ? svc()
   188	          .from('menstrual_cycle_logs')
   189	          .select('period_start_date, period_end_date, computed_cycle_length_days')
   190	          .eq('client_id', clientId)
   191	          .order('period_start_date', { ascending: false })
   192	          .limit(7)
   193	      : Promise.resolve({ data: null, error: null }),
   194	
   195	    fetchClientDayOverride(svc(), clientId, date),
   196	  ])
   197	
   198	  // ── Body weight ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   199	  const bodyWeightRow = weightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? weightResult.value.data : null
   200	  const checkinWeightRow = checkinWeightResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? checkinWeightResult.value.data : null
   201	  const bodyWeightKg = checkinWeightRow?.weight_kg != null
   202	    ? Number(checkinWeightRow.weight_kg)
   203	    : (bodyWeightRow?.numeric_value ? Number(bodyWeightRow.numeric_value) : null)
   204	
   205	  // ── Protocol day ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   206	  const protoData = protoResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? protoResult.value.data : null
   207	  const baseProtocolDay = resolveProtocolDayByDate(
   208	    date,
   209	    (protoData as any)?.schedule_start_date ?? null,
   210	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any) ?? [],
   211	    (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots as any) ?? [],
   212	  )
   213	  const dayOverride = dayOverrideResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? dayOverrideResult.value : null
   214	  const protocolDay = dayOverride?.kind === 'off'
   215	    ? resolveRestProtocolDay(((protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? [])) ?? baseProtocolDay
   216	    : baseProtocolDay
   217	  const tdeeAdaptive = (protoData as any)?.tdee_adaptive ?? null
   218	  const tdeeDataSource = (protoData as any)?.tdee_data_source ?? null
   219	  const cycleSyncEnabled: boolean = (protoData as any)?.cycle_sync_enabled ?? false
   220	  const protocolDays: Array<{ name: string; kcal: number; protein_g: number; carbs_g: number; fat_g: number; carb_cycle_type?: string | null; recommendations?: string | null }> =
   221	    ((protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? []).map((d: any) => ({
   222	      name:            String(d.name ?? ''),
   223	      kcal:            Number(d.calories ?? 0),
   224	      protein_g:       Number(d.protein_g ?? 0),
   225	      carbs_g:         Number(d.carbs_g ?? 0),
   226	      fat_g:           Number(d.fat_g ?? 0),
   227	      carb_cycle_type: d.carb_cycle_type ?? null,
   228	      recommendations: d.recommendations ?? null,
   229	    }))
   230	
   231	  // Map schedule slots to day names for the protocol tab
   232	  const rawSlots: any[] = (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_schedule_slots as any[]) ?? []
   233	  const rawDays: any[]  = (protoData?.nutrition_protocol_days as any[]) ?? []
   234	  const scheduleSlots: Array<{ dow: number; dayName: string; carbCycleType: string | null }> =
   235	    rawSlots.map((slot: any) => {
   236	      const day = rawDays.find((d: any) => d.position === slot.protocol_day_position)
   237	      return {
   238	        dow:           Number(slot.dow),
   239	        dayName:       String(day?.name ?? ''),
   240	        carbCycleType: day?.carb_cycle_type ?? null,
   241	      }
   242	    })
   243	
   244	  const td = protocolDay
   245	  let target: NutritionMacros = {
   246	    kcal:      Number(td?.calories     ?? 0),
   247	    protein_g: Number(td?.protein_g    ?? 0),
   248	    carbs_g:   Number(td?.carbs_g      ?? 0),
   249	    fat_g:     Number(td?.fat_g        ?? 0),
   250	    water_ml:  Number(td?.hydration_ml ?? 2500),
   251	  }
   252	
   253	  // ── Consumed today ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   254	  const rawMeals = mealsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (mealsResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   255	  const meals: NutritionMeal[] = rawMeals.map((m: any) => ({
   256	    ...m,
   257	    total_calories: computeMacroEnergy({
   258	      protein_g: Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   259	      carbs_g: Number(m.total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   260	      fat_g: Number(m.total_fat_g ?? 0),
   261	      fiber_g: Number(m.total_fiber_g ?? 0),
   262	    }),
   263	    entries: m.nutrition_entries ?? [],
   264	    nutrition_entries: undefined,
   265	  }))
   266	  const water = waterResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (waterResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   267	  const preps: SmartNutritionPrep[] = prepsResult.status === 'fulfilled'
   268	    ? ((prepsResult.value.data ?? []) as any[]).map((prep) => ({
   269	        ...prep,
   270	        meal_slot: prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   271	        variant_group_id: prep.variant_group_id ?? prep.meal_slot ?? prep.meal_type ?? 'snack',
   272	        scenario_key: prep.scenario_key ?? 'default',
   273	        scenario_label: prep.scenario_label ?? "Scénario principal",
   274	        is_active: prep.is_active === true,
   275	        entries: Array.isArray(prep.entries) ? prep.entries : [],
   276	        total_calories: Number(prep.total_calories ?? 0),
   277	        total_protein_g: Number(prep.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   278	        total_carbs_g: Number(prep.total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   279	        total_fat_g: Number(prep.total_fat_g ?? 0),
   280	        total_fiber_g: Number(prep.total_fiber_g ?? 0),
   281	      }))
   282	    : []
   283	
   284	  const consumedBase = meals.reduce(
   285	    (acc, m) => ({
   286	      kcal:      acc.kcal      + Number(m.total_calories  ?? 0),
   287	      protein_g: acc.protein_g + Number(m.total_protein_g ?? 0),
   288	      carbs_g:   acc.carbs_g   + Number(m.total_carbs_g   ?? 0),
   289	      fat_g:     acc.fat_g     + Number(m.total_fat_g     ?? 0),
   290	    }),
   291	    { kcal: 0, protein_g: 0, carbs_g: 0, fat_g: 0 },
   292	  )
   293	  const water_ml = water.reduce((s, w) => s + Number(w.amount_ml ?? 0), 0)
   294	  const caffeine_mg = water.reduce((s, w) => s + Number(w.caffeine_mg ?? 0), 0)
   295	  const consumed: NutritionMacros = { ...consumedBase, water_ml, caffeine_mg }
   296	
   297	  // ── IA alerts (pure fn, no HTTP) ──────────────────────────────────────────
   298	  const hasLunchLog = meals.some(m => m.meal_type === 'lunch')
   299	  const rawAlerts = computeNutritionAlerts({
   300	    consumed: { ...consumedBase, water_ml, caffeine_mg },
   301	    target,
   302	    currentHour: new Date().getHours(),
   303	    hasLunchLog,
   304	  })
   305	  const alerts: GenericAlert[] = rawAlerts.map(a => ({
   306	    code: a.code,
   307	    severity: a.severity,
   308	    title: a.title,
   309	    body: a.body,
   310	  }))
   311	
   312	  // ── Weekly trend ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   313	  const today = new Date()
   314	  const days: string[] = []
   315	  for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
   316	    const d = new Date(today)
   317	    d.setDate(today.getDate() - i)
   318	    days.push(d.toISOString().slice(0, 10))
   319	  }
   320	  const trendMeals = trendResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (trendResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   321	  type DayTotals = { kcal: number; protein_g: number; carbs_g: number; fat_g: number }
   322	  const trendTotals: Record<string, DayTotals> = {}
   323	  for (const d of days) trendTotals[d] = { kcal: 0, protein_g: 0, carbs_g: 0, fat_g: 0 }
   324	  for (const m of trendMeals) {
   325	    const key = (m as any).physiological_date as string
   326	    if (!trendTotals[key]) continue
   327	    trendTotals[key].kcal      += computeMacroEnergy({
   328	      protein_g: Number((m as any).total_protein_g ?? 0),
   329	      carbs_g: Number((m as any).total_carbs_g ?? 0),
   330	      fat_g: Number((m as any).total_fat_g ?? 0),
   331	    })
   332	    trendTotals[key].protein_g += Number((m as any).total_protein_g ?? 0)
   333	    trendTotals[key].carbs_g   += Number((m as any).total_carbs_g   ?? 0)
   334	    trendTotals[key].fat_g     += Number((m as any).total_fat_g     ?? 0)
   335	  }
   336	  const trend = days.map(d => ({
   337	    date:      d,
   338	    consumed:  trendTotals[d].kcal,
   339	    protein_g: trendTotals[d].protein_g,
   340	    carbs_g:   trendTotals[d].carbs_g,
   341	    fat_g:     trendTotals[d].fat_g,
   342	    target:    target.kcal,
   343	    targetProtein: target.protein_g,
   344	    targetCarbs:   target.carbs_g,
   345	    targetFat:     target.fat_g,
   346	  }))
   347	
   348	  // ── Streak / logged dates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   349	  const streakMeals = streakResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (streakResult.value.data ?? []) : []
   350	  const loggedDatesSet = new Set<string>(
   351	    streakMeals.map((m: any) => m.physiological_date as string)
   352	  )
   353	
   354	  // ── Language ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   355	  const rawLang = prefsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (prefsResult.value as any)?.data?.language : null
   356	  const lang: ClientLang = ['fr', 'en', 'es'].includes(rawLang) ? (rawLang as ClientLang) : 'fr'
   357	
   358	  // ── Cycle Sync (female only) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   359	  let cycleSyncPhase: CyclePhase | null = null
   360	  let cycleSyncAdjustment: CycleSyncAdjustment | null = null
   361	  let cycleDay: number | null = null
   362	
   363	  if (isFemale) {
   364	    const cycleRow = cycleResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (cycleResult.value as any)?.data : null
   365	    if (cycleRow) {
   366	      // value_text may be ISO date (last period) or numeric day string
   367	      const raw = cycleRow.value_text ?? null
   368	      const numericDay = cycleRow.numeric_value ? Number(cycleRow.numeric_value) : null
   369	
   370	      if (numericDay && numericDay >= 1) {
   371	        cycleDay = numericDay
   372	      } else if (raw && /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(raw)) {
   373	        // Compute cycle day from last period date
   374	        const lastPeriod = new Date(raw)
   375	        const todayDate = new Date(date)
   376	        const diffMs = todayDate.getTime() - lastPeriod.getTime()
   377	        const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000))
   378	        cycleDay = diffDays >= 0 ? (diffDays % 28) + 1 : null
   379	      }
   380	    }
   381	    if (cycleDay !== null) {
   382	      cycleSyncPhase = detectCurrentPhase(cycleDay)
   383	      cycleSyncAdjustment = getCycleSyncAdjustment(cycleSyncPhase)
   384	    }
   385	  }
   386	
   387	  // ── CycleState v2 (gold-standard engine) ─────────────────────────────────
   388	  let cycleState: CycleState | null = null
   389	  if (isFemale) {
   390	    const rawCycleLogs = cycleLogsResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? ((cycleLogsResult.value as any)?.data ?? []) : []
   391	    const cycleLogs: CycleLog[] = rawCycleLogs
   392	    const bilanRow = cycleResult.status === 'fulfilled' ? (cycleResult.value as any)?.data : null
   393	    const bilanValue: string | null = bilanRow?.value_text ?? null
   394	    cycleState = getCycleStateFromLogs(cycleLogs, bilanValue)
   395	  }
   396	
   397	  // Runtime cycle sync adjustment — applied only when coach enabled it and client has active phase
   398	  if (cycleSyncEnabled && cycleState?.currentPhase) {
   399	    const adj = getCycleSyncAdjustment(cycleState.currentPhase)
   400	    target = {
   401	      kcal:      Math.max(0, target.kcal      + adj.caloriesDelta),
   402	      protein_g: Math.max(0, target.protein_g + adj.proteinDelta),
   403	      carbs_g:   Math.max(0, target.carbs_g   + adj.carbsDelta),
   404	      fat_g:     Math.max(0, target.fat_g     + adj.fatDelta),
   405	      water_ml:  Math.max(0, target.water_ml  + adj.hydrationDeltaMl),
   406	    }
   407	  }
   408	
   409	  // Day type badge for TopBar
   410	  const isTrainingDay = dayOverride?.kind === 'off'
   411	    ? false
   412	    : inferTrainingDay((protocolDay as Record<string, unknown>) ?? null)
   413	  const dayTypeLabel = String((protocolDay as Record<string, unknown> | null)?.name ?? 'Repos')
   414	  const dayTypeBadge = (
   415	    <span
   416	      className="text-[9px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] px-2 py-1 rounded-lg"
   417	      style={{
   418	        background: isTrainingDay ? NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.trainingDayBg : NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.restDayBg,
   419	        color: isTrainingDay ? NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.trainingDay : NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.restDay,
   420	        border: `0.5px solid ${isTrainingDay ? NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.trainingDayBorder : NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.restDayBorder}`,
   421	      }}
   422	    >
   423	      {dayTypeLabel}
   424	    </span>
   425	  )
   426	
   427	  return (
   428	    <NutritionClientPage
   429	      date={date}
   430	      target={target}
   431	      consumed={consumed}
   432	      meals={meals}
   433	      preps={preps}
   434	      alerts={alerts}
   435	      trend={trend}
   436	      loggedDates={loggedDatesSet}
   437	      tdeeAdaptive={tdeeAdaptive}
   438	      tdeeDataSource={tdeeDataSource}
   439	      bodyWeightKg={bodyWeightKg}
   440	      gender={(client as { gender?: string | null }).gender ?? null}
   441	      protocolDay={protocolDay}
   442	      lang={lang}
   443	      dayTypeBadge={dayTypeBadge}
   444	      cycleSyncPhase={cycleSyncPhase}
   445	      cycleSyncAdjustment={cycleSyncAdjustment}
   446	      cycleDay={cycleDay}
   447	      cycleState={cycleState}
   448	      protocolDays={protocolDays}
   449	      scheduleSlots={scheduleSlots}
   450	      cycleSyncEnabled={cycleSyncEnabled}
   451	    />
   452	  )
   453	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: app/client/nutrition/NutritionClientPage.tsx

     1	'use client'
     2	
     3	import { useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
     4	import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
     5	import ClientTopBar from '@/components/client/ClientTopBar'
     6	import SmartNutritionHero from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionHero'
     7	import SmartAlertsFeed, { type GenericAlert } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartAlertsFeed'
     8	import RemainingBreakdown from '@/components/client/smart/RemainingBreakdown'
     9	import MacroWeekGrid from '@/components/client/smart/MacroWeekGrid'
    10	import NutritionMealsList from '@/components/client/smart/NutritionMealsList'
    11	import NutritionStreakCard from '@/components/client/smart/NutritionStreakCard'
    12	import TdeeChart from '@/components/client/smart/TdeeChart'
    13	import KcalVariationChart from '@/components/client/smart/KcalVariationChart'
    14	import TdeeVsIntakeChart from '@/components/client/smart/TdeeVsIntakeChart'
    15	import { ct, type ClientLang, type ClientDictKey } from '@/lib/i18n/clientTranslations'
    16	import type { NutritionMacros } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionWidget'
    17	import type { NutritionMeal } from '@/lib/nutrition/food-items'
    18	import type { SmartNutritionPrep } from '@/components/client/smart/SmartNutritionPrepList'
    19	import CycleSyncBanner from '@/components/client/nutrition/CycleSyncBanner'
    20	import type { CyclePhase, CycleSyncAdjustment } from '@/lib/nutrition/engine/cycleSync'
    21	import type { CycleState } from '@/lib/cycle/cycleEngine'
    22	import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
    23	
    24	const CycleArcIndicator = dynamic(() => import('@/components/client/cycle/CycleArcIndicator'), { ssr: false })
    25	const CyclePhaseModal   = dynamic(() => import('@/components/client/cycle/CyclePhaseModal'),   { ssr: false })
    26	const MealLogSheet      = dynamic(() => import('@/components/client/smart/MealLogSheet'),      { ssr: false })
    27	const QuickWaterModal   = dynamic(() => import('@/components/client/QuickWaterModal'),         { ssr: false })
    28	const VoiceLogSheet     = dynamic(() => import('@/components/client/smart/VoiceLogSheet'),     { ssr: false })
    29	
    30	type DayPoint = {
    31	  date: string
    32	  consumed: number
    33	  protein_g: number
    34	  carbs_g: number
    35	  fat_g: number
    36	  target: number
    37	  targetProtein: number
    38	  targetCarbs: number
    39	  targetFat: number
    40	}
    41	
    42	type Tab = 'suivi' | 'tendances'
    43	
    44	interface Props {
    45	  date: string
    46	  target: NutritionMacros
    47	  consumed: NutritionMacros
    48	  meals: NutritionMeal[]
    49	  preps: SmartNutritionPrep[]
    50	  alerts: GenericAlert[]
    51	  trend: DayPoint[]
    52	  loggedDates: Set<string>
    53	  tdeeAdaptive: number | null
    54	  tdeeDataSource: string | null
    55	  bodyWeightKg: number | null
    56	  gender?: string | null
    57	  protocolDay: { name?: string; [key: string]: unknown } | null
    58	  protocolDays?: Array<{
    59	    name: string
    60	    kcal: number
    61	    protein_g: number
    62	    carbs_g: number
    63	    fat_g: number
    64	    carb_cycle_type?: string | null
    65	    recommendations?: string | null
    66	  }>
    67	  scheduleSlots?: Array<{ dow: number; dayName: string; carbCycleType: string | null }>
    68	  lang: ClientLang
    69	  dayTypeBadge: React.ReactNode
    70	  cycleSyncPhase?: CyclePhase | null
    71	  cycleSyncAdjustment?: CycleSyncAdjustment | null
    72	  cycleDay?: number | null
    73	  cycleState?: CycleState | null
    74	  cycleSyncEnabled?: boolean
    75	}
    76	
    77	const TABS: { id: Tab; labelKey: ClientDictKey }[] = [
    78	  { id: 'suivi',     labelKey: 'nutrition.tab.suivi'     },
    79	  { id: 'tendances', labelKey: 'nutrition.tab.tendances' },
    80	]
    81	
    82	export default function NutritionClientPage({
    83	  date, target, consumed, meals, preps, alerts, trend,
    84	  loggedDates, tdeeAdaptive: _tdeeAdaptive, tdeeDataSource: _tdeeDataSource, bodyWeightKg,
    85	  gender,
    86	  protocolDay: _protocolDay, protocolDays: _protocolDays, scheduleSlots: _scheduleSlots,
    87	  lang, dayTypeBadge,
    88	  cycleSyncPhase, cycleSyncAdjustment, cycleDay,
    89	  cycleState,
    90	  cycleSyncEnabled: _cycleSyncEnabled = false,
    91	}: Props) {
    92	  const router = useRouter()
    93	  const [tab, setTab] = useState<Tab>('suivi')
    94	  const [trendDays, setTrendDays] = useState<7 | 14 | 30 | 90>(30)
    95	  const [mealLogOpen, setMealLogOpen] = useState(false)
    96	  const [mealComposerMode, setMealComposerMode] = useState<"standard" | "guide" | "simulation">("standard")
    97	  const [addToMealId, setAddToMealId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    98	  const [editingPrep, setEditingPrep] = useState<SmartNutritionPrep | null>(null)
    99	  const [cycleModalOpen, setCycleModalOpen] = useState(false)
   100	  const [waterOpen, setWaterOpen] = useState(false)
   101	  const [voiceOpen, setVoiceOpen] = useState(false)
   102	
   103	  const handleMealLogSuccess = useCallback(() => {
   104	    setMealLogOpen(false)
   105	    setMealComposerMode("standard")
   106	    setAddToMealId(null)
   107	    setEditingPrep(null)
   108	    router.refresh()
   109	  }, [router])
   110	
   111	  const handleVoiceSuccess = useCallback(() => {
   112	    setVoiceOpen(false)
   113	    router.refresh()
   114	  }, [router])
   115	
   116	  // Ouvrir le log pour un nouveau repas (depuis FAB + ou bouton "Ajouter un repas")
   117	  const openNewMealLog = useCallback(() => {
   118	    setAddToMealId(null)
   119	    setEditingPrep(null)
   120	    setMealComposerMode("standard")
   121	    setMealLogOpen(true)
   122	  }, [])
   123	
   124	  // Ouvrir le log pour ajouter des ingrédients à un repas existant
   125	  const handleAddMore = useCallback((mealId: string) => {
   126	    setAddToMealId(mealId)
   127	    setEditingPrep(null)
   128	    setMealComposerMode("standard")
   129	    setMealLogOpen(true)
   130	  }, [])
   131	
   132	  // Ouvrir le composer (mode guide) pour créer/éditer un prep
   133	  const openPrepEdit = useCallback((prep: SmartNutritionPrep) => {
   134	    setEditingPrep(prep)
   135	    setAddToMealId(null)
   136	    setMealComposerMode("guide")
   137	    setMealLogOpen(true)
   138	  }, [])
   139	
   140	  // Ouvrir le composer (mode guide) pour un nouveau prep
   141	  const openComposer = useCallback(() => {
   142	    setAddToMealId(null)
   143	    setEditingPrep(null)
   144	    setMealComposerMode("guide")
   145	    setMealLogOpen(true)
   146	  }, [])
   147	
   148	  // ── TopBar left: onglets ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   149	  const topBarLeft = (
   150	    <div className="flex gap-1 bg-white/[0.03] rounded-xl p-1">
   151	      {TABS.map(({ id, labelKey }) => (
   152	        <button
   153	          key={id}
   154	          onClick={() => setTab(id)}
   155	          className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-[11px] font-barlow-condensed font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all duration-200 ${
   156	            tab === id
   157	              ? 'bg-[#f2f2f2] text-[#080808] shadow-sm'
   158	              : 'text-white/40'
   159	          }`}
   160	        >
   161	          {ct(lang, labelKey)}
   162	        </button>
   163	      ))}
   164	    </div>
   165	  )
   166	
   167	  // ── TopBar right: badge jour + arc cycle ─────────────────────────────────
   168	  const topBarRight = (
   169	    <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-0.5">
   170	      {dayTypeBadge}
   171	      {cycleState?.currentPhase && cycleState.currentCycleDay && (
   172	        <>
   173	          <CycleArcIndicator
   174	            phase={cycleState.currentPhase}
   175	            cycleDay={cycleState.currentCycleDay}
   176	            avgCycleLength={cycleState.avgCycleLengthDays}
   177	            menstrualLength={cycleState.menstrualPhaseLengthDays}
   178	            confidence={cycleState.confidence}
   179	            onClick={() => setCycleModalOpen(true)}
   180	          />
   181	          <CyclePhaseModal
   182	            open={cycleModalOpen}
   183	            phase={cycleState.currentPhase}
   184	            cycleDay={cycleState.currentCycleDay}
   185	            avgCycleLength={cycleState.avgCycleLengthDays}
   186	            context="nutrition"
   187	            onClose={() => setCycleModalOpen(false)}
   188	          />
   189	        </>
   190	      )}
   191	    </div>
   192	  )
   193	
   194	  const balanceContextConsumed = useMemo(() => {
   195	    if (mealComposerMode !== "guide") {
   196	      return consumed
   197	    }
   198	    const base = { ...consumed }
   199	    for (const p of preps) {
   200	      if (p.is_active && p.id !== editingPrep?.id) {
   201	        base.kcal += p.total_calories
   202	        base.protein_g += p.total_protein_g
   203	        base.carbs_g += p.total_carbs_g
   204	        base.fat_g += p.total_fat_g
   205	      }
   206	    }
   207	    return base
   208	  }, [consumed, preps, editingPrep, mealComposerMode])
   209	
   210	  return (
   211	    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#0d0d0d] font-barlow pb-32">
   212	      <ClientTopBar left={topBarLeft} right={topBarRight} />
   213	
   214	      <main className="max-w-[480px] mx-auto px-4 pt-[72px] flex flex-col gap-3">
   215	
   216	        {/* ══ SUIVI ══ */}
   217	        {tab === 'suivi' && (
   218	          <>
   219	            {cycleSyncPhase && cycleSyncAdjustment && (
   220	              <CycleSyncBanner
   221	                phase={cycleSyncPhase}
   222	                adjustment={cycleSyncAdjustment}
   223	                cycleDay={cycleDay ?? undefined}
   224	              />
   225	            )}
   226	            <SmartNutritionHero date={date} consumed={consumed} target={target} onWaterClick={() => setWaterOpen(true)} />
   227	            <SmartAlertsFeed alerts={alerts} />
   228	            <RemainingBreakdown
   229	              consumed={consumed}
   230	              target={target}
   231	              gender={gender}
   232	              bodyWeightKg={bodyWeightKg}
   233	            />
   234	            <NutritionMealsList
   235	              key={date}
   236	              initialMeals={meals}
   237	              initialPreps={preps}
   238	              date={date}
   239	              target={target}
   240	              consumed={consumed}
   241	              onAddMeal={openNewMealLog}
   242	              onAddMore={handleAddMore}
   243	              onEditPrep={openPrepEdit}
   244	              onNewPrep={openComposer}
   245	              onPrepValidated={() => router.refresh()}
   246	              gender={gender}
   247	              bodyWeightKg={bodyWeightKg}
   248	            />
   249	          </>
   250	        )}
   251	
   252	        {/* ══ TENDANCES ══ */}
   253	        {tab === 'tendances' && (
   254	          <>
   255	            <MacroWeekGrid trend={trend} />
   256	            <NutritionStreakCard loggedDates={loggedDates} today={date} />
   257	
   258	            <div className="flex gap-1 bg-white/[0.03] rounded-xl p-1">
   259	              {([7, 14, 30, 90] as const).map(d => (
   260	                <button
   261	                  key={d}
   262	                  onClick={() => setTrendDays(d)}
   263	                  className={`flex-1 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-[10px] font-bold transition-all duration-200 ${
   264	                    trendDays === d ? 'bg-white/[0.08] text-white' : 'text-white/30'
   265	                  }`}
   266	                >
   267	                  {d}j
   268	                </button>
   269	              ))}
   270	            </div>
   271	
   272	            <TdeeChart days={trendDays} />
   273	            <KcalVariationChart days={trendDays} />
   274	            <TdeeVsIntakeChart days={trendDays} />
   275	          </>
   276	        )}
   277	
   278	      </main>
   279	
   280	      {/* ── Sheets & modals ── */}
   281	      <MealLogSheet
   282	        open={mealLogOpen}
   283	        mealId={addToMealId}
   284	        prep={editingPrep}
   285	        composerMode={mealComposerMode}
   286	        intent={mealComposerMode === "standard" ? "track" : "compose"}
   287	        activeDate={date}
   288	        onClose={() => {
   289	          setMealLogOpen(false)
   290	          setMealComposerMode("standard")
   291	          setAddToMealId(null)
   292	          setEditingPrep(null)
   293	        }}
   294	        onSuccess={handleMealLogSuccess}
   295	        balanceContext={{ consumed: balanceContextConsumed, target, profile: { gender, weightKg: bodyWeightKg } }}
   296	      />
   297	      <VoiceLogSheet
   298	        open={voiceOpen}
   299	        onClose={() => setVoiceOpen(false)}
   300	        onSuccess={handleVoiceSuccess}
   301	        lang={lang}
   302	        initialInputMode="voice"
   303	      />
   304	      <QuickWaterModal open={waterOpen} onClose={() => setWaterOpen(false)} date={date} />
   305	    </div>
   306	  )
   307	}

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: app/client/page.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import { createClient } from "@/utils/supabase/server"
     2	import { createClient as createServiceClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js"
     3	import { resolveClientFromUser } from "@/lib/client/resolve-client"
     4	import ChatPage from "@/components/client/ChatPage"
     5	
     6	function service() {
     7	  return createServiceClient(
     8	    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
     9	    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
    10	  )
    11	}
    12	
    13	async function getFreshCoachAvatarUrl(db: ReturnType<typeof service>, coachId: string): Promise<string | null> {
    14	  // List files in the coach's storage folder to find their logo regardless of extension
    15	  const { data: files } = await db.storage
    16	    .from('coach-assets')
    17	    .list(coachId, { limit: 10 })
    18	
    19	  const logoFile = files?.find(f => f.name.startsWith('logo'))
    20	  if (!logoFile) return null
    21	
    22	  // Generate a fresh signed URL (1 hour — regenerated on each page load)
    23	  const { data: signed } = await db.storage
    24	    .from('coach-assets')
    25	    .createSignedUrl(`${coachId}/${logoFile.name}`, 3600)
    26	
    27	  return signed?.signedUrl ?? null
    28	}
    29	
    30	export default async function ClientHomePage() {
    31	  const supabase = createClient()
    32	  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
    33	
    34	  let firstName: string | null = null
    35	  let coachAvatarUrl: string | null = null
    36	  let coachInitial: string | null = null
    37	
    38	  if (user) {
    39	    const db = service()
    40	    const cc = await resolveClientFromUser(user.id, user.email, db, 'id, first_name, coach_id')
    41	    firstName = (cc as any)?.first_name ?? null
    42	
    43	    const coachId = (cc as any)?.coach_id ?? null
    44	    if (coachId) {
    45	      const coachProfile = await db.from('coach_profiles')
    46	        .select('full_name, logo_url')
    47	        .eq('coach_id', coachId)
    48	        .maybeSingle()
    49	
    50	      const coachFullName: string | null = (coachProfile.data as any)?.full_name ?? null
    51	      const storedLogoUrl: string | null = (coachProfile.data as any)?.logo_url ?? null
    52	      coachInitial = coachFullName ? coachFullName.trim().charAt(0).toUpperCase() : null
    53	      // Use stored 10-year signed URL; regenerate from storage only if missing
    54	      coachAvatarUrl = storedLogoUrl ?? await getFreshCoachAvatarUrl(db, coachId)
    55	    }
    56	  }
    57	
    58	  return <ChatPage coachAvatarUrl={coachAvatarUrl} coachInitial={coachInitial} clientFirstName={firstName} />
    59	}
