   251	  const [ccProtocol,    setCcProtocol]    = useState<CarbCycleProtocol>('3/1')
   252	  const [ccResult,      setCcResult]      = useState<CarbCyclingResult | null>(null)
   253	
   254	  // ── Hydration state ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   255	  const [hydClimate, setHydClimate] = useState<HydrationClimate>('temperate')
   256	  const [hydResult,  setHydResult]  = useState<{ liters: number; glasses: number; breakdown: { base: number; gender: number; activity: number; climate: number }; warnings: string[] } | null>(null)
   257	
   258	  // ── Cycle Sync state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   259	  const [csInputMode,   setCsInputMode]   = useState<CycleInputMode>('day')
   260	  const [csCycleLength, setCsCycleLength] = useState('28')
   261	  const [csCurrentDay,  setCsCurrentDay]  = useState('')
   262	  const [csLastPeriod,  setCsLastPeriod]  = useState('')
   263	  const [csResult,      setCsResult]      = useState<{
   264	    phase: CyclePhase; dayOfCycle: number; adjustedCal: number
   265	    adjustedProtein: number; adjustedCarbs: number; adjustedFats: number
   266	    supplements: string[]; training: typeof PHASE_TRAINING[CyclePhase]; warnings: string[]
   267	  } | null>(null)
   268	
   269	  const activeDay = days[activeDayIndex] ?? days[0]
   270	  const isFemale  = gender === 'female'
   271	  const canCalculateMacros = useMemo(
   272	    () => parseFloat(weight) >= 40 && parseFloat(height) >= 140 && parseFloat(age) >= 15,
   273	    [weight, height, age]
   274	  )
   275	
   276	  // ── Click outside dropdown ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
   277	  useEffect(() => {
   278	    function onOut(e: MouseEvent) {
   279	      if (searchRef.current && !searchRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) setShowDropdown(false)
   280	    }
   281	    document.addEventListener('mousedown', onOut)
   282	    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', onOut)
   283	  }, [])
   284	
   285	  // ── Auto-inject clientId data on mount ─────────────────────────────────────
   286	  // FIX: cardio_frequency and session_duration_min are correctly mapped to their own state
   287	  useEffect(() => {
   288	    if (clientLoaded) return
   289	    fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-data`)
   290	      .then(r => r.json())
   291	      .then(d => {
   292	        const c: NutritionClientData = d.client
   293	        if (!c) { setClientLoaded(true); return }
   294	        if (c.weight_kg)              setWeight(String(c.weight_kg))
   295	        if (c.body_fat_pct)           setBodyFat(String(c.body_fat_pct))
   296	        if (c.age)                    setAge(String(c.age))
   297	        if (c.height_cm)              setHeight(String(c.height_cm))
   298	        if (c.muscle_mass_kg)         setMuscleMass(String(c.muscle_mass_kg))
   299	        if (c.bmr_kcal_measured)      setBmrMeasured(String(c.bmr_kcal_measured))
   300	        if (c.visceral_fat_level)     setVisceralFat(String(c.visceral_fat_level))
   301	        // FIX: session_duration_min → sessionDuration, cardio_frequency → cardioFreq (NOT mixed up)
   302	        if (c.session_duration_min)   setSessionDuration(String(c.session_duration_min))
   303	        if (c.cardio_frequency != null) setCardioFreq(String(c.cardio_frequency))
   304	        if (c.training_calories_weekly) setTrainingCalsWeekly(String(c.training_calories_weekly))
   305	        if (c.cardio_duration_min)    setCardioDuration(String(c.cardio_duration_min))
   306	        if (c.daily_steps)            setDailySteps(String(c.daily_steps))
   307	        if (c.stress_level)           setStressLevel(String(c.stress_level))
   308	        if (c.sleep_duration_h)       setSleepH(String(c.sleep_duration_h))
   309	        if (c.sleep_quality)          setSleepQuality(String(c.sleep_quality))
   310	        if (c.energy_level)           setEnergyLevel(String(c.energy_level))
   311	        if (c.caffeine_daily_mg)      setCaffeineDaily(String(c.caffeine_daily_mg))
   312	        if (c.alcohol_weekly)         setAlcoholWeekly(String(c.alcohol_weekly))
   313	        if (c.work_hours_per_week)    setWorkHours(String(c.work_hours_per_week))
   314	        if (c.weekly_frequency)       setWorkouts(String(c.weekly_frequency))
   315	        if (c.gender)                 setGender(c.gender === 'female' ? 'female' : 'male')
   316	        if (c.occupation) {
   317	          if (c.occupation.toLowerCase().includes('debout') || c.occupation.toLowerCase().includes('bout')) setCcOccupation('debout')
   318	          else if (c.occupation.toLowerCase().includes('physique') || c.occupation.toLowerCase().includes('manuel')) setCcOccupation('physique')
   319	          else setCcOccupation('sedentaire')
   320	        }
   321	        if (c.training_goal) {
   322	          const m = CLIENT_GOAL_MAP[c.training_goal.toLowerCase()]
   323	          if (m) setGoal(m)
   324	        }
   325	        if (c.sport_practice) {
   326	          const m = SPORT_PRACTICE_MAP[c.sport_practice.toLowerCase()]
   327	          if (m) setActivityLevel(m)
   328	        }
   329	        setClientLoaded(true)
   330	        setDataInjected(true)
   331	      })
   332	      .catch(() => { setClientLoaded(true) })
   333	  }, [clientId, clientLoaded])
   334	
   335	  // FIX: Sync ccGoal whenever the main goal changes
   336	  useEffect(() => {
   337	    setCcGoal(MACRO_TO_CC_GOAL[goal])
   338	  }, [goal])
   339	
   340	  // ── MacroCalculator compute ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   341	  const buildMacroInput = useCallback(() => {
   342	    const w = parseFloat(weight); const h = parseFloat(height); const a = parseFloat(age)
   343	    if (!w || !h || !a) return null
   344	    const steps = dailySteps ? parseInt(dailySteps) : ACTIVITY_STEPS[activityLevel]
   345	    return {
   346	      weight: w, height: h, age: a, gender, goal,
   347	      bodyFat:     bodyFat     ? parseFloat(bodyFat)     : undefined,
   348	      muscleMassKg: muscleMass ? parseFloat(muscleMass)  : undefined,
   349	      bmrKcalMeasured: bmrMeasured ? parseFloat(bmrMeasured) : undefined,
   350	      visceralFatLevel: visceralFat ? parseFloat(visceralFat) : undefined,
   351	      steps,
   352	      workHoursPerWeek: workHours ? parseFloat(workHours) : undefined,
   353	      workouts: parseInt(workouts) || 0,
   354	      sessionDurationMin: sessionDuration ? parseFloat(sessionDuration) : undefined,
   355	      trainingCaloriesWeekly: trainingCalsWeekly ? parseFloat(trainingCalsWeekly) : undefined,
   356	      cardioFrequency: cardioFreq ? parseFloat(cardioFreq) : undefined,
   357	      cardioDurationMin: cardioDuration ? parseFloat(cardioDuration) : undefined,
   358	      stressLevel:   stressLevel   ? parseFloat(stressLevel)   : undefined,
   359	      sleepDurationH: sleepH       ? parseFloat(sleepH)        : undefined,
   360	      sleepQuality:  sleepQuality  ? parseFloat(sleepQuality)  : undefined,
   361	      energyLevel:   energyLevel   ? parseFloat(energyLevel)   : undefined,
   362	      caffeineDaily: caffeineDaily ? parseFloat(caffeineDaily) : undefined,
   363	      alcoholWeekly: alcoholWeekly ? parseFloat(alcoholWeekly) : undefined,
   364	      menstrualPhase: (menstrualPhase || undefined) as 'follicular' | 'luteal' | 'unknown' | undefined,
   365	    }
   366	  }, [weight, height, age, gender, goal, bodyFat, muscleMass, bmrMeasured, visceralFat,
   367	      activityLevel, dailySteps, workHours, workouts, sessionDuration, trainingCalsWeekly,
   368	      cardioFreq, cardioDuration, stressLevel, sleepH, sleepQuality, energyLevel,
   369	      caffeineDaily, alcoholWeekly, menstrualPhase])
   370	
   371	  const computeMacros = useCallback(() => {
   372	    const input = buildMacroInput()
   373	    if (!input) return
   374	    const res = calculateMacros(input)
   375	    setBaseMacroResult(res); setMacroResult(res)
   376	    setCalorieAdjust(0); setProteinOverride('')
   377	    setTimeout(() => resultsRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }), 80)
   378	  }, [buildMacroInput])
   379	
   380	  // FIX: Auto-calc macros after client data is injected
   381	  useEffect(() => {
   382	    if (dataInjected && canCalculateMacros) {
   383	      computeMacros()
   384	      setDataInjected(false)
   385	    }
   386	  }, [dataInjected, canCalculateMacros, computeMacros])
   387	
   388	  // ── Macro adjustments live recalc ───────────────────────────────────────────
   389	  useEffect(() => {
   390	    if (!baseMacroResult) return
   391	    const bw = parseFloat(weight) || 1
   392	    const adjustedCals = Math.round(baseMacroResult.calories + baseMacroResult.tdee * calorieAdjust / 100)
   393	    const proteinG = proteinOverride !== ''
   394	      ? Math.max(0, Math.round((parseFloat(proteinOverride) || 0) * bw))
   395	      : baseMacroResult.macros.p
   396	    const remainingKcal = adjustedCals - proteinG * 4
   397	    let fats: number, carbs: number
   398	    if (proteinOverride !== '') {
   399	      fats  = Math.max(20, Math.round(remainingKcal * 0.30 / 9))
   400	      carbs = Math.max(0,  Math.round((remainingKcal - fats * 9) / 4))
   401	    } else {
   402	      const delta = adjustedCals - baseMacroResult.calories
   403	      fats  = Math.max(20, baseMacroResult.macros.f + Math.round(delta * 0.30 / 9))
   404	      carbs = Math.max(0,  baseMacroResult.macros.c + Math.round(delta * 0.70 / 4))
   405	    }
   406	    const totalKcal = proteinG * 4 + fats * 9 + carbs * 4
   407	    const lbm = baseMacroResult.leanMass
   408	    setMacroResult(prev => prev ? {
   409	      ...prev, calories: adjustedCals, macros: { p: proteinG, f: fats, c: carbs },
   410	      ratios: {
   411	        p: Math.round((proteinG / lbm) * 10) / 10,
   412	        f: Math.round((fats / bw)     * 10) / 10,
   413	        c: Math.round((carbs / bw)    * 10) / 10,
   414	      },
   415	      ratiosByBW: {
   416	        p: Math.round((proteinG / bw) * 10) / 10,
   417	        f: Math.round((fats / bw)     * 10) / 10,
   418	        c: Math.round((carbs / bw)    * 10) / 10,
   419	      },
   420	      percents: {
   421	        p: Math.round((proteinG * 4 / totalKcal) * 100),
   422	        f: Math.round((fats    * 9 / totalKcal) * 100),
   423	        c: Math.round((carbs   * 4 / totalKcal) * 100),
   424	      },
   425	    } : prev)
   426	  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
   427	  }, [calorieAdjust, proteinOverride])
   428	
   429	  const applyProtocolSuggestion = (s: SmartProtocolSuggestion) => {
   430	    if (!baseMacroResult || !macroResult) return
   431	    const bw = parseFloat(weight) || 1
   432	    if (s.id === 'protein_low') {
   433	      const optRatio = goal === 'deficit' ? 2.7 : 2.2
   434	      setProteinOverride((baseMacroResult.leanMass * optRatio / bw).toFixed(1))
   435	    }
   436	    if (['fats_critical', 'sleep_suboptimal', 'stress_critical'].includes(s.id)) {
   437	      setCalorieAdjust(prev => Math.min(prev + 5, 30))
   438	    }
   439	    setActiveProtocol(s.id)
   440	    setTimeout(() => setActiveProtocol(null), 2000)
   441	  }
   442	
   443	  // ── Client search injection ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   444	  const injectClient = useCallback((client: LabClient) => {
   445	    if (client.weight_kg   != null) setWeight(String(client.weight_kg))
   446	    if (client.body_fat_pct != null) setBodyFat(String(client.body_fat_pct))
   447	    if (client.age         != null) setAge(String(client.age))
   448	    if (client.height_cm   != null) setHeight(String(client.height_cm))
   449	    if (client.muscle_mass_kg != null) setMuscleMass(String(client.muscle_mass_kg))
   450	    if (client.bmr_kcal_measured != null) setBmrMeasured(String(client.bmr_kcal_measured))
   451	    if (client.visceral_fat_level != null) setVisceralFat(String(client.visceral_fat_level))
   452	    if (client.session_duration_min != null) setSessionDuration(String(client.session_duration_min))
   453	    if (client.training_calories_weekly != null) setTrainingCalsWeekly(String(client.training_calories_weekly))
   454	    if (client.cardio_frequency != null) setCardioFreq(String(client.cardio_frequency))
   455	    if (client.cardio_duration_min != null) setCardioDuration(String(client.cardio_duration_min))
   456	    if (client.daily_steps != null) setDailySteps(String(client.daily_steps))
   457	    if (client.stress_level != null) setStressLevel(String(client.stress_level))
   458	    if (client.sleep_duration_h != null) setSleepH(String(client.sleep_duration_h))
   459	    if (client.sleep_quality != null) setSleepQuality(String(client.sleep_quality))
   460	    if (client.energy_level != null) setEnergyLevel(String(client.energy_level))
   461	    if (client.caffeine_daily_mg != null) setCaffeineDaily(String(client.caffeine_daily_mg))
   462	    if (client.alcohol_weekly != null) setAlcoholWeekly(String(client.alcohol_weekly))
   463	    if (client.work_hours_per_week != null) setWorkHours(String(client.work_hours_per_week))
   464	    if (client.weekly_frequency != null) setWorkouts(String(client.weekly_frequency))
   465	    if (client.training_goal) {
   466	      const m = CLIENT_GOAL_MAP[client.training_goal.toLowerCase()]
   467	      if (m) setGoal(m)
   468	    }
   469	    if (client.sport_practice) {
   470	      const m = SPORT_PRACTICE_MAP[client.sport_practice.toLowerCase()]
   471	      if (m) setActivityLevel(m)
   472	    }
   473	    setGender(client.gender === 'female' || client.gender === 'Femme' ? 'female' : 'male')
   474	    setMacroResult(null); setBaseMacroResult(null)
   475	    setCalorieAdjust(0); setProteinOverride('')
   476	    setShowAdvanced(true)
   477	    setDataInjected(true)
   478	  }, [])
   479	
   480	  // ── Apply macro result to active day ───────────────────────────────────────
   481	  function applyMacrosToDay() {
   482	    if (!macroResult) return
   483	    updateDay(activeDayIndex, {
   484	      calories: String(macroResult.calories),
   485	      protein_g: String(macroResult.macros.p),
   486	      carbs_g: String(macroResult.macros.c),
   487	      fat_g: String(macroResult.macros.f),
   488	    })
   489	  }
   490	
   491	  // ── Carb Cycling compute ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   492	  const computeCarbCycling = useCallback(() => {
   493	    const w = parseFloat(weight); const h = parseFloat(height)
   494	    const a = parseFloat(age)
   495	    if (!w || !h || !a) return
   496	    const res = calculateCarbCycling({
   497	      gender: gender === 'female' ? 'female' : 'male',
   498	      age: a, weight: w, height: h,
   499	      bodyFat: bodyFat ? parseFloat(bodyFat) : undefined,
   500	      occupation: ccOccupation,
   501	      sessionsPerWeek: parseInt(workouts) || 3,
   502	      sessionDuration: sessionDuration ? parseFloat(sessionDuration) : 60,
   503	      intensity: ccIntensity,
   504	      goal: ccGoal, phase: ccPhase, protocol: ccProtocol, insulin: ccInsulin,
   505	    })
   506	    setCcResult(res)
   507	  }, [weight, height, age, gender, bodyFat, workouts, sessionDuration,
   508	      ccOccupation, ccIntensity, ccGoal, ccPhase, ccProtocol, ccInsulin])
   509	
   510	  function applyCarbCyclingHighDay() {
   511	    if (!ccResult) return
   512	    updateDay(activeDayIndex, {
   513	      calories: String(ccResult.high.kcal),
   514	      protein_g: String(ccResult.high.p),
   515	      carbs_g: String(ccResult.high.c),
   516	      fat_g: String(ccResult.high.f),
   517	      carb_cycle_type: 'high',
   518	    })
   519	  }
   520	  function applyCarbCyclingLowDay() {
   521	    if (!ccResult) return
   522	    updateDay(activeDayIndex, {
   523	      calories: String(ccResult.low.kcal),
   524	      protein_g: String(ccResult.low.p),
   525	      carbs_g: String(ccResult.low.c),
   526	      fat_g: String(ccResult.low.f),
   527	      carb_cycle_type: 'low',
   528	    })
   529	  }
   530	
   531	  // ── Hydration compute ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   532	  const computeHydration = useCallback(() => {
   533	    const w = parseFloat(weight)
   534	    if (!w) return
   535	    const res = calculateHydration({
   536	      weight: w,
   537	      gender: gender === 'female' ? 'female' : 'male',
   538	      activity: HYDRATION_ACTIVITY_MAP[activityLevel],
   539	      climate: hydClimate,
   540	    })
   541	    setHydResult(res)
   542	  }, [weight, gender, activityLevel, hydClimate])
   543	
   544	  function applyHydrationToDay() {
   545	    if (!hydResult) return
   546	    updateDay(activeDayIndex, { hydration_ml: String(Math.round(hydResult.liters * 1000)) })
   547	  }
   548	
   549	  // ── Cycle Sync compute ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   550	  const computeCycleSync = useCallback(() => {
   551	    if (!macroResult) return
   552	    let dayOfCycle: number
   553	    const cl = parseInt(csCycleLength) || 28
   554	    if (csInputMode === 'day') {
   555	      dayOfCycle = parseInt(csCurrentDay) || 1
   556	    } else {
   557	      if (!csLastPeriod) return
   558	      const diffMs = Date.now() - new Date(csLastPeriod).getTime()
   559	      const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
   560	      dayOfCycle = (diffDays % cl) || cl
   561	    }
   562	    const phase = calculateCyclePhase(dayOfCycle, cl)
   563	    const proto = PHASE_NUTRITION[phase]
   564	    const train = PHASE_TRAINING[phase]
   565	    const adjustedCal     = Math.round(macroResult.calories * proto.caloriesModifier)
   566	    const adjustedCarbs   = Math.round(macroResult.macros.c * proto.carbsModifier)
   567	    const adjustedFats    = Math.round(macroResult.macros.f * proto.fatsModifier)
   568	    const remainingKcal   = adjustedCal - macroResult.macros.p * 4 - adjustedFats * 9
   569	    const adjustedProtein = Math.max(macroResult.macros.p, Math.round(remainingKcal / 4))
   570	    const warnings: string[] = []
   571	    if (adjustedCal < 1200) warnings.push('Apport calorique très bas — surveiller la récupération')
   572	    setCsResult({ phase, dayOfCycle, adjustedCal, adjustedProtein, adjustedCarbs, adjustedFats, supplements: proto.supplements, training: train, warnings })
   573	  }, [macroResult, csInputMode, csCycleLength, csCurrentDay, csLastPeriod])
   574	
   575	  function applyCycleSyncToDay() {
   576	    if (!csResult) return
   577	    updateDay(activeDayIndex, {
   578	      calories: String(csResult.adjustedCal),
   579	      protein_g: String(csResult.adjustedProtein),
   580	      carbs_g: String(csResult.adjustedCarbs),
   581	      fat_g: String(csResult.adjustedFats),
   582	      cycle_sync_phase: csResult.phase,
   583	    })
   584	  }
   585	
   586	  // ── Generate full protocol (smart fill all days) ────────────────────────────
   587	  function generateFullProtocol() {
   588	    if (!macroResult) return
   589	    const w = parseFloat(weight)
   590	    const ccInput = w && parseFloat(height) && parseFloat(age) ? {
   591	      gender: gender === 'female' ? 'female' : 'male' as 'male' | 'female',
   592	      age: parseFloat(age), weight: w, height: parseFloat(height),
   593	      bodyFat: bodyFat ? parseFloat(bodyFat) : undefined,
   594	      occupation: ccOccupation,
   595	      sessionsPerWeek: parseInt(workouts) || 3,
   596	      sessionDuration: sessionDuration ? parseFloat(sessionDuration) : 60,
   597	      intensity: ccIntensity,
   598	      goal: ccGoal, phase: ccPhase, protocol: ccProtocol, insulin: ccInsulin,
   599	    } : null
   600	    const ccRes = ccInput ? calculateCarbCycling(ccInput) : null
   601	    const hydRes = w ? calculateHydration({
   602	      weight: w,
   603	      gender: gender === 'female' ? 'female' : 'male',
   604	      activity: HYDRATION_ACTIVITY_MAP[activityLevel],
   605	      climate: hydClimate,
   606	    }) : null
   607	
   608	    setDays(prev => prev.map((day, i) => {
   609	      const isTraining = day.name.toLowerCase().includes('entrainement') ||
   610	        day.name.toLowerCase().includes('entraînement') ||
   611	        day.name.toLowerCase().includes('training') ||
   612	        day.name.toLowerCase().includes('muscul') ||
   613	        day.name.toLowerCase().includes('sport') ||
   614	        i % 2 === 0
   615	
   616	      const macros = ccRes
   617	        ? (isTraining ? { calories: String(ccRes.high.kcal), protein_g: String(ccRes.high.p), carbs_g: String(ccRes.high.c), fat_g: String(ccRes.high.f), carb_cycle_type: 'high' as const }
   618	                      : { calories: String(ccRes.low.kcal),  protein_g: String(ccRes.low.p),  carbs_g: String(ccRes.low.c),  fat_g: String(ccRes.low.f),  carb_cycle_type: 'low' as const })
   619	        : { calories: String(macroResult.calories), protein_g: String(macroResult.macros.p), carbs_g: String(macroResult.macros.c), fat_g: String(macroResult.macros.f), carb_cycle_type: '' as const }
   620	
   621	      const hydration = hydRes ? { hydration_ml: String(Math.round(hydRes.liters * 1000)) } : {}
   622	
   623	      return { ...day, ...macros, ...hydration }
   624	    }))
   625	  }
   626	
   627	  // ── Day management ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   628	  function updateDay(index: number, updates: Partial<DayDraft>) {
   629	    setDays(prev => prev.map((d, i) => i === index ? { ...d, ...updates } : d))
   630	  }
   631	  function addDay() {
   632	    const nd = emptyDayDraft(`Jour ${days.length + 1}`)
   633	    setDays(prev => [...prev, nd]); setActiveDayIndex(days.length)
   634	  }
   635	  function removeDay(index: number) {
   636	    setDays(prev => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index))
   637	    setActiveDayIndex(prev => Math.min(prev, days.length - 2))
   638	  }
   639	  function renameDay(index: number, name: string) {
   640	    setDays(prev => prev.map((d, i) => i === index ? { ...d, name } : d))
   641	  }
   642	
   643	  // ── Save ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   644	  function daysPayload() {
   645	    return days.map((d, i) => ({
   646	      id: d.dbId, name: d.name, position: i,
   647	      calories:         d.calories         ? Number(d.calories)         : null,
   648	      protein_g:        d.protein_g        ? Number(d.protein_g)        : null,
   649	      carbs_g:          d.carbs_g          ? Number(d.carbs_g)          : null,
   650	      fat_g:            d.fat_g            ? Number(d.fat_g)            : null,
   651	      hydration_ml:     d.hydration_ml     ? Number(d.hydration_ml)     : null,
   652	      carb_cycle_type:  d.carb_cycle_type  || null,
   653	      cycle_sync_phase: d.cycle_sync_phase || null,
   654	      recommendations:  d.recommendations  || null,
   655	    }))
   656	  }
   657	
   658	  async function handleSave() {
   659	    setSaving(true); setError('')
   660	    try {
   661	      const payload = { name: protocolName, days: daysPayload() }
   662	      const url = isEditing && existingProtocol
   663	        ? `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${existingProtocol.id}`
   664	        : `/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols`
   665	      const method = isEditing ? 'PATCH' : 'POST'
   666	      const res = await fetch(url, { method, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) })
   667	      if (!res.ok) { const e = await res.json(); setError(e.error ?? 'Erreur'); return }
   668	      router.push(`/coach/clients/${clientId}/protocoles/nutrition`)
   669	    } catch { setError('Erreur réseau') } finally { setSaving(false) }
   670	  }
   671	
   672	  async function handleSaveAndShare() {
   673	    setSaving(true); setSharing(true); setError('')
   674	    try {
   675	      const payload = { name: protocolName, days: daysPayload() }
   676	      let protocolId = existingProtocol?.id
   677	      if (isEditing && protocolId) {
   678	        const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${protocolId}`, {
   679	          method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   680	        })
   681	        if (!res.ok) { setError('Erreur'); return }
   682	      } else {
   683	        const res = await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols`, {
   684	          method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   685	        })
   686	        if (!res.ok) { setError('Erreur'); return }
   687	        const data = await res.json(); protocolId = data.protocol.id
   688	      }
   689	      if (protocolId) await fetch(`/api/clients/${clientId}/nutrition-protocols/${protocolId}/share`, { method: 'POST' })
   690	      router.push(`/coach/clients/${clientId}/protocoles/nutrition`)
   691	    } catch { setError('Erreur réseau') } finally { setSaving(false); setSharing(false) }
   692	  }
   693	
   694	  // ─── Render ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   695	
   696	  return (
   697	    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#121212]">
   698	      <div className="max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 pb-24 space-y-5 pt-4">
   699	
   700	        {/* ── Protocol name + actions ── */}
   701	        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   702	          <div className="flex-1">
   703	            <FieldLabel>Nom du protocole</FieldLabel>
   704	            <input
   705	              value={protocolName}
   706	              onChange={e => setProtocolName(e.target.value)}
   707	              placeholder="ex: Protocole Avril 2026"
   708	              className="w-full h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-4 text-[14px] font-semibold text-white placeholder:text-white/20 outline-none focus:border-white/[0.12] transition-colors"
   709	            />
   710	          </div>
   711	        </div>
   712	
   713	        {/* ── Day tabs ── */}
   714	        <div>
   715	          <p className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mb-2">Jours du protocole</p>
   716	          <NutritionProtocolDayTabs
   717	            days={days} activeDayIndex={activeDayIndex}
   718	            onSelectDay={setActiveDayIndex} onAddDay={addDay}
   719	            onRemoveDay={removeDay} onRenameDay={renameDay}
   720	          />
   721	        </div>
   722	
   723	        {/* ── Day summary bar ── */}
   724	        {activeDay && (
   725	          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl px-4 py-3">
   726	            <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/50 shrink-0">{activeDay.name}</p>
   727	            <div className="flex-1 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
   728	              {activeDay.calories && (
   729	                <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-[#1f8a65]/10 border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65]/20 text-[10px] font-bold text-[#1f8a65]">{activeDay.calories} kcal</span>
   730	              )}
   731	              {activeDay.protein_g && <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold" style={{ background: `${NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein}18`, border: `0.3px solid ${NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein}33`, color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein }}>P: {activeDay.protein_g}g</span>}
   732	              {activeDay.carbs_g && <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold" style={{ background: `${NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs}18`, border: `0.3px solid ${NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs}33`, color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs }}>G: {activeDay.carbs_g}g</span>}
   733	              {activeDay.fat_g && <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold" style={{ background: `${NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat}18`, border: `0.3px solid ${NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat}33`, color: NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat }}>L: {activeDay.fat_g}g</span>}
   734	              {activeDay.hydration_ml && <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-sky-500/10 border-[0.3px] border-sky-500/20 text-[10px] font-bold text-sky-400">{activeDay.hydration_ml}ml eau</span>}
   735	              {activeDay.carb_cycle_type && <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-violet-500/10 border-[0.3px] border-violet-500/20 text-[10px] font-bold text-violet-400">Jour {activeDay.carb_cycle_type}</span>}
   736	              {activeDay.cycle_sync_phase && <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-pink-500/10 border-[0.3px] border-pink-500/20 text-[10px] font-bold text-pink-400">{PHASE_LABELS[activeDay.cycle_sync_phase as CyclePhase]}</span>}
   737	            </div>
   738	            {/* Générer tout */}
   739	            {macroResult && (
   740	              <button
   741	                onClick={generateFullProtocol}
   742	                className="shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 h-8 px-3 rounded-lg bg-[#1f8a65]/10 border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65]/25 text-[10px] font-bold text-[#1f8a65] hover:bg-[#1f8a65]/20 transition-all active:scale-[0.97]"
   743	              >
   744	                <Sparkles size={11} />
   745	                Générer tous les jours
   746	              </button>
   747	            )}
   748	          </div>
   749	        )}
   750	
   751	        {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   752	            MACRO CALCULATOR — Layout dual-pane
   753	        ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */}
   754	        <div className="bg-white/[0.01] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden">
   755	          {/* Header section */}
   756	          <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5 px-4 py-3 border-b-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04]">
   757	            <FlaskConical size={13} className="text-[#1f8a65]" strokeWidth={1.75} />
   758	            <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/70">Calculateur Macros & TDEE</span>
   759	            <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-bold bg-[#1f8a65]/10 text-[#1f8a65]/70 ml-1">Principal</span>
   760	            {clientLoaded && (
   761	              <span className="ml-auto flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-bold bg-[#1f8a65]/10 border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65]/20 text-[#1f8a65]">
   762	                <CheckCircle2 size={9} />
   763	                Données injectées
   764	              </span>
   765	            )}
   766	          </div>
   767	
   768	          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-[520px_1fr] gap-5 p-4">
   769	
   770	            {/* ══ COLONNE GAUCHE — Inputs ══ */}
   771	            <div className="space-y-3">
   772	
   773	              {/* Client search */}
   774	              <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-4">
   775	                <SectionHeader icon={UserCheck}>Client injecté</SectionHeader>
   776	                <div className="relative" ref={searchRef}>
   777	                  <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 h-9 rounded-lg border-[0.3px] px-3 transition-colors ${
   778	                    clientSearch.selected ? 'border-[#1f8a65]/30 bg-[#1f8a65]/[0.05]' : 'border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03]'
   779	                  }`}>
   780	                    <UserCheck size={13} className={clientSearch.selected ? 'text-[#1f8a65]/60' : 'text-white/20'} />
   781	                    <input
   782	                      value={clientSearch.query}
   783	                      onChange={e => { clientSearch.search(e.target.value); setShowDropdown(true) }}
   784	                      onFocus={() => clientSearch.results.length > 0 && setShowDropdown(true)}
   785	                      placeholder="Changer de client…"
   786	                      className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-[12px] font-medium text-white placeholder:text-white/25 outline-none"
   787	                    />
   788	                    {clientSearch.selected ? (
   789	                      <button onClick={() => { clientSearch.clear() }} className="text-white/30 hover:text-white/60 transition-colors"><X size={12} /></button>
   790	                    ) : clientSearch.loading ? (
   791	                      <div className="w-3 h-3 border border-white/20 border-t-white/60 rounded-full animate-spin" />
   792	                    ) : null}
   793	                  </div>
   794	                  {showDropdown && clientSearch.results.length > 0 && (
   795	                    <div className="absolute top-full left-0 right-0 mt-1 bg-[#181818] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl overflow-hidden z-50 shadow-xl">
   796	                      {clientSearch.results.map((client, i) => (
   797	                        <button key={client.id}
   798	                          onClick={() => { clientSearch.select(client); injectClient(client); setShowDropdown(false) }}
   799	                          className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2.5 hover:bg-white/[0.05] transition-colors text-left ${i < clientSearch.results.length - 1 ? 'border-b-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04]' : ''}`}
   800	                        >
   801	                          <div>
   802	                            <p className="text-[12px] font-semibold text-white">{client.name}</p>
   803	                            {client.email && <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30">{client.email}</p>}
   804	                          </div>
   805	                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px] text-white/30 font-mono">
   806	                            {client.weight_kg != null && <span>{client.weight_kg}kg</span>}
   807	                            {client.body_fat_pct != null && <span>{client.body_fat_pct}%</span>}
   808	                          </div>
   809	                        </button>
   810	                      ))}
   811	                    </div>
   812	                  )}
   813	                </div>
   814	                {clientLoaded && (weight || age) && (
   815	                  <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04] grid grid-cols-3 gap-1.5">
   816	                    {[
   817	                      { label: 'Poids', value: weight, unit: 'kg' }, { label: 'BF%', value: bodyFat, unit: '%' },
   818	                      { label: 'Taille', value: height, unit: 'cm' }, { label: 'Âge', value: age, unit: 'ans' },
   819	                      { label: 'Séances', value: workouts, unit: '/sem' }, { label: 'Pas/j', value: dailySteps, unit: '' },
   820	                    ].map(({ label, value, unit }) => value ? (
   821	                      <div key={label} className="bg-white/[0.02] rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-center">
   822	                        <p className="text-[9px] text-white/30 mb-0.5">{label}</p>
   823	                        <p className="text-[11px] font-bold text-white">{value}{unit}</p>
   824	                      </div>
   825	                    ) : null)}
   826	                  </div>
   827	                )}
   828	              </div>
   829	
   830	              {/* Biométrie */}
   831	              <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-4">
   832	                <SectionHeader icon={Activity}>Biométrie & Profil</SectionHeader>
   833	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   834	                  <div className="col-span-2">
   835	                    <FieldLabel>Sexe</FieldLabel>
   836	                    <div className="flex gap-1.5">
   837	                      {([['male', 'Homme'], ['female', 'Femme']] as const).map(([v, l]) => (
   838	                        <button key={v} onClick={() => setGender(v)}
   839	                          className={`flex-1 h-8 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-bold border-[0.3px] transition-all ${
   840	                            gender === v ? 'bg-[#1f8a65]/10 border-[#1f8a65]/30 text-[#1f8a65]' : 'bg-white/[0.03] border-white/[0.06] text-white/40 hover:text-white/70'
   841	                          }`}>{l}</button>
   842	                      ))}
   843	                    </div>
   844	                  </div>
   845	                  <div><FieldLabel>Âge</FieldLabel><NumInput value={age} onChange={setAge} placeholder="30" min="15" max="85" /></div>
   846	                  <div><FieldLabel>Poids (kg)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={weight} onChange={setWeight} placeholder="75" min="40" max="250" /></div>
   847	                  <div><FieldLabel>Taille (cm)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={height} onChange={setHeight} placeholder="178" min="140" max="220" /></div>
   848	                  <div><FieldLabel>Masse grasse (%)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={bodyFat} onChange={setBodyFat} placeholder="15" step="0.1" /></div>
   849	                  <div><FieldLabel>Masse musculaire (kg)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={muscleMass} onChange={setMuscleMass} placeholder="Optionnel" step="0.1" /></div>
   850	                  <div><FieldLabel>BMR mesuré (kcal)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={bmrMeasured} onChange={setBmrMeasured} placeholder="Balance impédance" /></div>
   851	                </div>
   852	              </div>
   853	
   854	              {/* Activité */}
   855	              <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-4">
   856	                <SectionHeader icon={Zap}>Activité & Entraînement</SectionHeader>
   857	                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   858	                  <div className="col-span-2">
   859	                    <FieldLabel>Niveau d&apos;activité quotidienne</FieldLabel>
   860	                    <DSSelect value={activityLevel} onChange={setActivityLevel}
   861	                      options={(Object.entries(ACTIVITY_LABELS) as [ActivityLevel, string][]).map(([v, l]) => ({ value: v, label: l }))}
   862	                    />
   863	                  </div>
   864	                  <div><FieldLabel>Séances musculation/sem</FieldLabel><NumInput value={workouts} onChange={setWorkouts} placeholder="3" min="0" max="7" /></div>
   865	                  <div><FieldLabel>Durée session (min)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={sessionDuration} onChange={setSessionDuration} placeholder="60" /></div>
   866	                  <div><FieldLabel>Séances cardio/sem</FieldLabel><NumInput value={cardioFreq} onChange={setCardioFreq} placeholder="0" min="0" max="14" /></div>
   867	                  <div><FieldLabel>Durée cardio (min)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={cardioDuration} onChange={setCardioDuration} placeholder="30" /></div>
   868	                  <div><FieldLabel>Pas quotidiens</FieldLabel><NumInput value={dailySteps} onChange={setDailySteps} placeholder="Auto" /></div>
   869	                  <div><FieldLabel>Kcal sport/sem (tracker)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={trainingCalsWeekly} onChange={setTrainingCalsWeekly} placeholder="Tracker" /></div>
   870	                </div>
   871	              </div>
   872	
   873	              {/* Objectif */}
   874	              <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-4">
   875	                <SectionHeader>Objectif</SectionHeader>
   876	                <div className="space-y-1.5">
   877	                  {(Object.entries(GOAL_LABELS) as [MacroGoal, string][]).map(([v, l]) => (
   878	                    <button key={v} onClick={() => setGoal(v)}
   879	                      className={`w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 h-9 rounded-lg border-[0.3px] text-left transition-all ${
   880	                        goal === v ? 'bg-[#1f8a65]/10 border-[#1f8a65]/25 text-white' : 'bg-white/[0.02] border-white/[0.05] text-white/45 hover:text-white/70 hover:bg-white/[0.04]'
   881	                      }`}>
   882	                      <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold">{l}</span>
   883	                      {goal === v && <CheckCircle2 size={12} className="text-[#1f8a65]" />}
   884	                    </button>
   885	                  ))}
   886	                </div>
   887	              </div>
   888	
   889	              {/* Avancé */}
   890	              <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
   891	                <button onClick={() => setShowAdvanced(v => !v)}
   892	                  className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors">
   893	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   894	                    <FlaskConical size={11} className="text-white/30" />
   895	                    <span className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">Données avancées (bien-être, lifestyle)</span>
   896	                    {[stressLevel, sleepH, alcoholWeekly, caffeineDaily, visceralFat].some(Boolean) && (
   897	                      <span className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-[#1f8a65]/15 text-[#1f8a65] text-[9px] font-bold">
   898	                        {[stressLevel, sleepH, alcoholWeekly, caffeineDaily, visceralFat].filter(Boolean).length} renseignés
   899	                      </span>
   900	                    )}
   901	                  </div>
   902	                  {showAdvanced ? <ChevronUp size={13} className="text-white/30" /> : <ChevronDown size={13} className="text-white/30" />}
   903	                </button>
   904	                {showAdvanced && (
   905	                  <div className="px-4 pb-4 border-t-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04] pt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   906	                    <div><FieldLabel>Stress (1–10)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={stressLevel} onChange={setStressLevel} placeholder="—" min="1" max="10" step="0.5" /></div>
   907	                    <div><FieldLabel>Sommeil (h)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={sleepH} onChange={setSleepH} placeholder="—" step="0.5" /></div>
   908	                    <div><FieldLabel>Qualité sommeil (1–5)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={sleepQuality} onChange={setSleepQuality} placeholder="—" min="1" max="5" /></div>
   909	                    <div><FieldLabel>Énergie (1–10)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={energyLevel} onChange={setEnergyLevel} placeholder="—" min="1" max="10" /></div>
   910	                    <div><FieldLabel>Caféine (mg/j)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={caffeineDaily} onChange={setCaffeineDaily} placeholder="200" /></div>
   911	                    <div><FieldLabel>Alcool (verres/sem)</FieldLabel><NumInput value={alcoholWeekly} onChange={setAlcoholWeekly} placeholder="0" /></div>
   912	                    <div><FieldLabel>Heures travail/sem</FieldLabel><NumInput value={workHours} onChange={setWorkHours} placeholder="35" /></div>
   913	                    <div><FieldLabel>Graisse viscérale</FieldLabel><NumInput value={visceralFat} onChange={setVisceralFat} placeholder="Balance InBody" /></div>
   914	                    {gender === 'female' && (
   915	                      <div className="col-span-2">
   916	                        <FieldLabel>Phase du cycle</FieldLabel>
   917	                        <DSSelect value={menstrualPhase} onChange={setMenstrualPhase}
   918	                          options={[
   919	                            { value: '', label: 'Non renseigné' },
   920	                            { value: 'follicular', label: 'Folliculaire (J1–J14)' },
   921	                            { value: 'luteal', label: 'Lutéale (J14–J28)' },
   922	                            { value: 'unknown', label: 'Inconnue' },
   923	                          ]}
   924	                        />
   925	                      </div>
   926	                    )}
   927	                  </div>
   928	                )}
   929	              </div>
   930	
   931	              {/* Calculer */}
   932	              <button onClick={computeMacros} disabled={!canCalculateMacros}
   933	                className="w-full h-11 rounded-xl bg-[#1f8a65] hover:bg-[#217356] active:scale-[0.99] disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed text-[12px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   934	                <FlaskConical size={14} />
   935	                Calculer les macros
   936	              </button>
   937	            </div>
   938	
   939	            {/* ══ COLONNE DROITE — Résultats ══ */}
   940	            <div ref={resultsRef}>
   941	              {!macroResult ? (
   942	                <div className="h-full min-h-[400px] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 border-[0.3px] border-dashed border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl">
   943	                  <FlaskConical size={28} className="text-white/10" />
   944	                  {clientLoaded && !canCalculateMacros ? (
   945	                    <p className="text-[12px] text-white/20">Poids, taille et âge requis (min 40kg, 140cm, 15 ans)</p>
   946	                  ) : (
   947	                    <p className="text-[12px] text-white/20">Renseigne les données et lance le calcul</p>
   948	                  )}
   949	                </div>
   950	              ) : (
   951	                <div className="space-y-3">
   952	
   953	                  {/* Context flags */}
   954	                  {(macroResult.contextFlags.length > 0 || macroResult.corrections.length > 0) && (
   955	                    <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-4">
   956	                      <SectionHeader icon={Info}>Sources de données</SectionHeader>
   957	                      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
   958	                        {macroResult.contextFlags.map(f => (
   959	                          <div key={f.key} title={f.detail}
   960	                            className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full border-[0.3px] text-[10px] font-semibold cursor-help ${
   961	                              f.type === 'success' ? 'border-[#1f8a65]/30 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 text-[#1f8a65]' :
   962	                              f.type === 'danger'  ? 'border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/10 text-red-400' :
   963	                              f.type === 'warning' ? 'border-amber-500/30 bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400' :
   964	                              'border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] text-white/40'
   965	                            }`}>
   966	                            {f.type === 'success' ? <CheckCircle2 size={9} /> : f.type === 'danger' ? <AlertTriangle size={9} /> : f.type === 'warning' ? <AlertTriangle size={9} /> : <Info size={9} />}
   967	                            {f.label}
   968	                          </div>
   969	                        ))}
   970	                      </div>
   971	                      {macroResult.corrections.length > 0 && (
   972	                        <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04] space-y-1">
   973	                          {macroResult.corrections.map(c => (
   974	                            <div key={c.field} className="flex items-center justify-between text-[10px]">
   975	                              <span className="text-white/35">{c.label} : {c.value} {c.unit}</span>
   976	                              <span className="text-amber-400/70 font-semibold">+{c.delta} kcal</span>
   977	                            </div>
   978	                          ))}
   979	                        </div>
   980	                      )}
   981	                    </div>
   982	                  )}
   983	
   984	                  {/* TDEE Breakdown */}
   985	                  <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-4">
   986	                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
   987	                      <SectionHeader icon={Activity}>Dépense énergétique</SectionHeader>
   988	                      <span className="text-[9px] text-white/30">Objectif {macroResult.adjustment > 0 ? '+' : ''}{macroResult.adjustment} kcal</span>
   989	                    </div>
   990	                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
   991	                      {[
   992	                        { label: 'BMR', value: macroResult.breakdown.bmr, color: 'text-blue-400' },
   993	                        { label: '+ NEAT', value: macroResult.breakdown.neat, color: 'text-emerald-400' },
   994	                        { label: '+ EAT', value: macroResult.breakdown.eat + macroResult.breakdown.eatCardio, color: 'text-violet-400' },
   995	                        { label: '+ TEF', value: macroResult.breakdown.tef, color: 'text-orange-400' },
   996	                        ...(macroResult.breakdown.alcohol > 0 ? [{ label: '+ Alcool', value: macroResult.breakdown.alcohol, color: 'text-red-400' }] : []),
   997	                      ].map((item, i, arr) => (
   998	                        <React.Fragment key={item.label}>
   999	                          <div className="flex flex-col items-center shrink-0">
  1000	                            <span className={`text-[15px] font-black tabular-nums ${item.color}`}>{item.value}</span>
  1001	                            <span className="text-[8px] text-white/30 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide">{item.label}</span>
  1002	                          </div>
  1003	                          {i < arr.length - 1 && <span className="text-white/15 text-[11px] shrink-0 mx-0.5">=</span>}
  1004	                        </React.Fragment>
  1005	                      ))}
  1006	                      <span className="text-white/15 text-[11px] shrink-0 mx-0.5">=</span>
  1007	                      <div className="flex flex-col items-center shrink-0">
  1008	                        <span className="text-[15px] font-black tabular-nums text-white">{macroResult.tdee}</span>
  1009	                        <span className="text-[8px] text-white/30 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide">TDEE</span>
  1010	                      </div>
  1011	                      <span className="text-white/15 text-[11px] shrink-0 mx-0.5">→</span>
  1012	                      <div className="flex flex-col items-center shrink-0">
  1013	                        <span className="text-[18px] font-black tabular-nums text-[#1f8a65]">{macroResult.calories}</span>
  1014	                        <span className="text-[8px] text-[#1f8a65]/60 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide">Cible</span>
  1015	                      </div>
  1016	                    </div>
  1017	                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
  1018	                      {[
  1019	                        { label: 'BMR', value: macroResult.breakdown.bmr, color: 'bg-blue-500/60', pct: macroResult.breakdown.bmr / macroResult.tdee * 100 },
  1020	                        { label: 'NEAT', value: macroResult.breakdown.neat, color: 'bg-emerald-500/60', pct: macroResult.breakdown.neat / macroResult.tdee * 100 },
  1021	                        { label: 'EAT', value: macroResult.breakdown.eat + macroResult.breakdown.eatCardio, color: 'bg-violet-500/60', pct: (macroResult.breakdown.eat + macroResult.breakdown.eatCardio) / macroResult.tdee * 100 },
  1022	                        { label: 'TEF', value: macroResult.breakdown.tef, color: 'bg-orange-500/60', pct: macroResult.breakdown.tef / macroResult.tdee * 100 },
  1023	                      ].map(b => (
  1024	                        <div key={b.label} className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1025	                          <span className="text-[10px] text-white/30 w-8 shrink-0">{b.label}</span>
  1026	                          <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-white/[0.04] overflow-hidden">
  1027	                            <div className={`h-full rounded-full ${b.color}`} style={{ width: `${Math.min(100, b.pct)}%` }} />
  1028	                          </div>
  1029	                          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50 w-12 text-right tabular-nums">{b.value} kcal</span>
  1030	                        </div>
  1031	                      ))}
  1032	                    </div>
  1033	                    <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t-[0.3px] border-white/[0.04] grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 text-center">
  1034	                      <div>
  1035	                        <p className="text-[18px] font-black text-white tabular-nums">{macroResult.leanMass}<span className="text-[10px] text-white/30 font-normal ml-0.5">kg</span></p>
  1036	                        <p className="text-[9px] text-white/30">Masse maigre</p>
  1037	                      </div>
  1038	                      <div>
  1039	                        <p className="text-[18px] font-black text-white tabular-nums">{macroResult.estimatedBF}<span className="text-[10px] text-white/30 font-normal ml-0.5">%</span></p>
  1040	                        <p className="text-[9px] text-white/30">BF% estimé</p>
  1041	                      </div>

  1043	                        <p className="text-[18px] font-black text-white tabular-nums">{macroResult.tdee - macroResult.calories > 0 ? '-' : '+'}{Math.abs(macroResult.tdee - macroResult.calories)}<span className="text-[10px] text-white/30 font-normal ml-0.5">kcal</span></p>

  1089	                              </span>

  1101	                            <input type="number" step="0.1" min="0.5" max="4" value={proteinOverride}
  1102	                              onChange={e => setProteinOverride(e.target.value)}
  1103	                              placeholder={baseMacroResult && weight ? (baseMacroResult.macros.p / (parseFloat(weight) || 1)).toFixed(1) : '—'}

  1123	                          <p className="text-[10px] text-amber-400/70 leading-relaxed">
  1124	                            {macroResult.recoveryAdaptation.reason} → réduire le déficit de {macroResult.recoveryAdaptation.suggestedDeficitReduction}% conseillé.
  1125	                          </p>
  1126	                          <button onClick={() => setCalorieAdjust(prev => Math.min(prev + macroResult.recoveryAdaptation!.suggestedDeficitReduction, 30))}
  1127	                            className="mt-2 text-[10px] font-bold text-amber-400 hover:text-amber-300 transition-colors">
  1128	                            Appliquer +{macroResult.recoveryAdaptation.suggestedDeficitReduction}% →
  1129	                          </button>
  1130	                        </div>
  1131	                      </div>
  1132	                    </div>
  1133	                  )}
  1134	
  1135	                  {/* Warnings */}
  1136	                  {macroResult.warnings.length > 0 && (
  1137	                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
  1138	                      {macroResult.warnings.map((w, i) => (

  1140	                          <AlertTriangle size={11} className="text-red-400 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
  1141	                          <span className="text-[11px] text-red-300/80">{w}</span>
  1142	                        </div>
  1143	                      ))}
  1144	                    </div>
  1145	                  )}
  1146	
  1147	                  {/* Smart Protocol */}
  1148	                  {macroResult.smartProtocol.length > 0 && (
  1149	                    <div className="bg-white/[0.02] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] rounded-xl p-4">
  1150	                      <SectionHeader icon={Zap}>Smart Protocol</SectionHeader>
  1151	                      <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30 mb-3 -mt-1 leading-relaxed">Recommandations basées sur la littérature scientifique.</p>
  1152	                      <div className="space-y-2">
  1153	                        {macroResult.smartProtocol.map(s => {
  1154	                          const cfg = PRIORITY_CONFIG[s.priority]
  1155	                          const isActive = activeProtocol === s.id
  1156	                          const isApplyable = ['protein_low', 'fats_critical', 'sleep_suboptimal', 'stress_critical'].includes(s.id)
  1157	                          return (
  1158	                            <div key={s.id} className={`rounded-xl border-[0.3px] p-3 ${cfg.bg} ${cfg.border} ${isActive ? 'ring-1 ring-[#1f8a65]/30' : ''}`}>
  1159	                              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
  1160	                                <div className="flex items-start gap-2 flex-1 min-w-0">
  1161	                                  <div className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full shrink-0 mt-1.5 ${cfg.dot}`} />
  1162	                                  <div className="min-w-0">
  1163	                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap mb-0.5">
  1164	                                      <span className={`text-[11px] font-bold ${cfg.color}`}>{s.title}</span>
  1165	                                      <span className={`text-[8px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border-[0.3px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide ${cfg.color} ${cfg.border} opacity-70`}>
  1166	                                        {s.priority === 'critical' ? 'Critique' : s.priority === 'high' ? 'Prioritaire' : s.priority === 'medium' ? 'Recommandé' : 'Info'}
  1167	                                      </span>

  1169	                                    <p className="text-[10px] text-white/40 leading-relaxed mb-1.5">{s.rationale}</p>
  1170	                                    <p className="text-[10px] text-white/60 font-medium">→ {s.action}</p>
  1171	                                    {s.source && <p className="text-[9px] text-white/20 mt-1 italic">{s.source}</p>}
  1172	                                  </div>
  1173	                                </div>
  1174	                                {isApplyable && (
  1175	                                  <button onClick={() => applyProtocolSuggestion(s)}
  1176	                                    className={`shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 h-7 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all ${
  1177	                                      isActive ? 'bg-[#1f8a65]/20 text-[#1f8a65] border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65]/30' : 'bg-white/[0.05] text-white/40 hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white/70 border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06]'
  1178	                                    }`}>
  1179	                                    {isActive ? <Check size={10} /> : <Send size={10} />}
  1180	                                    {isActive ? 'Appliqué' : 'Appliquer'}
  1181	                                  </button>
  1182	                                )}
  1183	                              </div>
  1184	                            </div>
  1185	                          )
  1186	                        })}
  1187	                      </div>
  1188	                    </div>
  1189	                  )}
  1190	
  1191	                  {/* Apply to day */}
  1192	                  <button onClick={applyMacrosToDay}
  1193	                    className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 h-10 rounded-xl bg-[#1f8a65]/15 border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65]/25 text-[11px] font-bold text-[#1f8a65] hover:bg-[#1f8a65]/25 transition-all active:scale-[0.98]">
  1194	                    <ArrowRight size={13} />
  1195	                    Appliquer à &quot;{activeDay?.name}&quot;
  1196	                  </button>
  1197	
  1198	                  {/* Provenance */}
  1199	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-white/20">
  1200	                    <span>LBM:{macroResult.dataProvenance.lbmSource}</span>

    80	function parseNumber(value: string) {
    81	  if (value.trim() === '') return null;
    82	  const parsed = Number(value);
    83	  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
    84	}
    85	
    86	function toStringValue(value: number | null | undefined) {
    87	  return value == null ? '' : String(value);
    88	}
    89	
    90	function useCopyState() {
    91	  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
    92	
    93	  async function copy(text: string) {
    94	    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    95	    setCopied(true);
    96	    window.setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1500);
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  return { copied, copy };
   100	}
   101	
   102	function FieldLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
   103	  return <label className="mb-1 block text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">{children}</label>;
   104	}
   105	
   106	function TextField({
   107	  value,
   108	  onChange,
   109	  placeholder,
   110	  type = 'text',
   111	  min,
   112	  max,
   113	  step,
   114	}: {
   115	  value: string;
   116	  onChange: (value: string) => void;
   117	  placeholder?: string;
   118	  type?: string;
   119	  min?: string;
   120	  max?: string;
   121	  step?: string;
   122	}) {
   123	  return (
   124	    <input
   125	      value={value}
   126	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
   127	      type={type}
   128	      min={min}
   129	      max={max}
   130	      step={step}
   131	      placeholder={placeholder}
   132	      className="h-9 w-full rounded-lg border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-colors placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-white/[0.12]"
   133	    />
   134	  );
   135	}
   136	
   137	function SelectField<T extends string>({
   138	  value,
   139	  onChange,
   140	  options,
   141	}: {
   142	  value: T;
   143	  onChange: (value: T) => void;
   144	  options: Array<{ value: T; label: string }>;
   145	}) {
   146	  return (
   147	    <select
   148	      value={value}
   149	      onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value as T)}
   150	      className="h-9 w-full cursor-pointer appearance-none rounded-lg border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white outline-none transition-colors focus:border-white/[0.12]"
   151	    >
   152	      {options.map((option) => (
   153	        <option key={option.value} value={option.value} className="bg-[#181818]">
   154	          {option.label}
   155	        </option>
   156	      ))}
   157	    </select>
   158	  );
   159	}
   160	
   161	function MetricCard({
   162	  label,
   163	  value,
   164	  suffix,
   165	  tone = 'white',
   166	}: {
   167	  label: string;
   168	  value: string | number;
   169	  suffix?: string;
   170	  tone?: 'white' | 'green' | 'amber';
   171	}) {
   172	  const toneCls =
   173	    tone === 'green' ? 'text-[#1f8a65]' : tone === 'amber' ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-white';
   174	
   175	  return (
   176	    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3">
   177	      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">{label}</p>
   178	      <div className="mt-2 flex items-end gap-1">
   179	        <span className={`text-[22px] font-semibold leading-none ${toneCls}`}>{value}</span>
   180	        {suffix && <span className="pb-0.5 text-[10px] text-white/35">{suffix}</span>}
   181	      </div>
   182	    </div>
   183	  );
   184	}
   185	
   186	function Disclosure({
   187	  title,
   188	  children,
   189	  defaultOpen = false,
   190	  icon: Icon,
   191	}: {
   192	  title: string;
   193	  children: React.ReactNode;
   194	  defaultOpen?: boolean;
   195	  icon?: React.ElementType;
   196	}) {
   197	  const [open, setOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);
   198	
   199	  return (
   200	    <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02]">
   201	      <button
   202	        type="button"
   203	        onClick={() => setOpen((value) => !value)}
   204	        className="flex w-full items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 text-left"
   205	      >
   206	        <span className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/70">
   207	          {Icon && <Icon size={13} className="text-white/35" />}
   208	          {title}
   209	        </span>
   210	        {open ? (
   211	          <ChevronUp size={13} className="text-white/30" />
   212	        ) : (
   213	          <ChevronDown size={13} className="text-white/30" />
   214	        )}
   215	      </button>
   216	      {open && <div className="border-t border-white/[0.05] px-4 py-3">{children}</div>}
   217	    </div>
   218	  );
   219	}
   220	
   221	function parsePlanFromSearch(searchParams: ReturnType<typeof useSearchParams>) {
   222	  const gender = searchParams.get('gender');
   223	  const goal = searchParams.get('goal');
   224	  const age = parseNumber(searchParams.get('age') ?? '');
   225	  const height = parseNumber(searchParams.get('height') ?? '');
   226	  const weight = parseNumber(searchParams.get('weight') ?? '');
   227	
   228	  if (gender !== 'male' && gender !== 'female') return null;
   229	  if (goal !== 'deficit' && goal !== 'maintenance' && goal !== 'surplus') return null;
   230	  if (age == null || height == null || weight == null) return null;
   231	
   232	  const occupation = parseNumber(searchParams.get('occupation') ?? '');
   233	  const phase = searchParams.get('cycle');
   234	
   235	  return {
   236	    gender,
   237	    goal,
   238	    age,
   239	    height,
   240	    weight,
   241	    steps: parseNumber(searchParams.get('steps') ?? ''),
   242	    occupation,
   243	    workouts: parseNumber(searchParams.get('workouts') ?? ''),
   244	    duration: parseNumber(searchParams.get('duration') ?? ''),
   245	    cardio: parseNumber(searchParams.get('cardio') ?? ''),
   246	    cardioDuration: parseNumber(searchParams.get('cardioDuration') ?? ''),
   247	    bodyFat: parseNumber(searchParams.get('bodyFat') ?? ''),
   248	    bmr: parseNumber(searchParams.get('bmr') ?? ''),
   249	    sleep: parseNumber(searchParams.get('sleep') ?? ''),
   250	    stress: parseNumber(searchParams.get('stress') ?? ''),
   251	    caffeine: parseNumber(searchParams.get('caffeine') ?? ''),
   252	    alcohol: parseNumber(searchParams.get('alcohol') ?? ''),
   253	    phase: phase === 'follicular' || phase === 'luteal' ? phase : 'unknown',
   254	  };
   255	}
   256	
   257	export default function PublicTdeeWizard() {
   258	  const router = useRouter();
   259	  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
   260	  const hydratedFromQuery = useRef(false);
   261	
   262	  const [step, setStep] = useState<Step>(1);
   263	  const [advancedOpen, setAdvancedOpen] = useState(false);
   264	  const [plan, setPlan] = useState<PublicTdeePlan | null>(null);
   265	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
   266	  const { copied, copy } = useCopyState();
   267	
   268	  const [gender, setGender] = useState<PublicTdeeInput['gender']>('male');
   269	  const [goal, setGoal] = useState<PublicTdeeInput['goal']>('deficit');
   270	  const [age, setAge] = useState('30');
   271	  const [heightCm, setHeightCm] = useState('180');
   272	  const [weightKg, setWeightKg] = useState('80');
   273	  const [dailySteps, setDailySteps] = useState('8000');
   274	  const [occupationMultiplier, setOccupationMultiplier] = useState('1.00');
   275	  const [workoutsPerWeek, setWorkoutsPerWeek] = useState('4');
   276	  const [sessionDurationMin, setSessionDurationMin] = useState('60');
   277	  const [cardioSessionsPerWeek, setCardioSessionsPerWeek] = useState('');
   278	  const [cardioDurationMin, setCardioDurationMin] = useState('');
   279	  const [bodyFatPct, setBodyFatPct] = useState('');
   280	  const [bmrMeasuredKcal, setBmrMeasuredKcal] = useState('');
   281	  const [sleepHours, setSleepHours] = useState('');
   282	  const [stressLevel, setStressLevel] = useState('');
   283	  const [caffeineDailyMg, setCaffeineDailyMg] = useState('');
   284	  const [alcoholWeekly, setAlcoholWeekly] = useState('');
   285	  const [menstrualPhase, setMenstrualPhase] = useState<PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase>('unknown');
   286	
   287	  useEffect(() => {
   288	    if (hydratedFromQuery.current) return;
   289	    const seeded = parsePlanFromSearch(searchParams);
   290	    hydratedFromQuery.current = true;
   291	    if (!seeded) return;
   292	
   293	    setGender(seeded.gender as PublicTdeeInput['gender']);
   294	    setGoal(seeded.goal as PublicTdeeInput['goal']);
   295	    setAge(String(seeded.age));
   296	    setHeightCm(String(seeded.height));
   297	    setWeightKg(String(seeded.weight));
   298	    setDailySteps(toStringValue(seeded.steps));
   299	    setOccupationMultiplier(toStringValue(seeded.occupation));
   300	    setWorkoutsPerWeek(toStringValue(seeded.workouts));
   301	    setSessionDurationMin(toStringValue(seeded.duration));
   302	    setCardioSessionsPerWeek(toStringValue(seeded.cardio));
   303	    setCardioDurationMin(toStringValue(seeded.cardioDuration));
   304	    setBodyFatPct(toStringValue(seeded.bodyFat));
   305	    setBmrMeasuredKcal(toStringValue(seeded.bmr));
   306	    setSleepHours(toStringValue(seeded.sleep));
   307	    setStressLevel(toStringValue(seeded.stress));
   308	    setCaffeineDailyMg(toStringValue(seeded.caffeine));
   309	    setAlcoholWeekly(toStringValue(seeded.alcohol));
   310	    setMenstrualPhase(seeded.phase as PublicTdeeMenstrualPhase);
   311	
   312	    try {
   313	      const computed = computePublicTdeePlan({
   314	        gender: seeded.gender as PublicTdeeInput['gender'],
   315	        goal: seeded.goal as PublicTdeeInput['goal'],
   316	        age: seeded.age,
   317	        heightCm: seeded.height,
   318	        weightKg: seeded.weight,
   319	        dailySteps: seeded.steps ?? undefined,
   320	        occupationMultiplier: seeded.occupation ?? undefined,
   321	        workoutsPerWeek: seeded.workouts ?? undefined,
   322	        sessionDurationMin: seeded.duration ?? undefined,
   323	        cardioSessionsPerWeek: seeded.cardio ?? undefined,
   324	        cardioDurationMin: seeded.cardioDuration ?? undefined,
   325	        bodyFatPct: seeded.bodyFat ?? undefined,
   326	        bmrMeasuredKcal: seeded.bmr ?? undefined,
   327	        sleepHours: seeded.sleep ?? undefined,
   328	        stressLevel: seeded.stress ?? undefined,
   329	        caffeineDailyMg: seeded.caffeine ?? undefined,
   330	        alcoholWeekly: seeded.alcohol ?? undefined,
   331	        menstrualPhase: seeded.phase,
   332	      });
   333	      setPlan(computed);
   334	      setStep(4);
   335	    } catch {
   336	      setStep(3);
   337	    }
   338	  }, [searchParams]);
   339	
   340	  const topLeft = useMemo(
   341	    () => (
   342	      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   343	        <button
   344	          type="button"
   345	          onClick={() => router.push('/outils')}
   346	          className="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] text-white/40 transition-all hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white/75"
   347	        >
   348	          <ArrowLeft size={14} />
   349	        </button>
   350	        <div>
   351	          <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/30">Nutrition · CALC_02</p>
   352	          <p className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">TDEE Expert</p>
   353	        </div>
   354	      </div>
   355	    ),
   356	    [router],
   357	  );
   358	
   359	  useSetTopBar(topLeft, null);
   360	
   361	  const sharePath = useMemo(() => {
   362	    if (!plan) return '';
   363	    return `/outils/tdee?${plan.shareQuery}`;
   364	  }, [plan]);
   365	
   366	  function buildInput(): PublicTdeeInput {
   367	    return {
   368	      gender,
   369	      goal,
   370	      age: Number(age),
   371	      heightCm: Number(heightCm),
   372	      weightKg: Number(weightKg),
   373	      dailySteps: parseNumber(dailySteps) ?? undefined,
   374	      occupationMultiplier: parseNumber(occupationMultiplier) ?? undefined,
   375	      workoutsPerWeek: parseNumber(workoutsPerWeek) ?? undefined,
   376	      sessionDurationMin: parseNumber(sessionDurationMin) ?? undefined,
   377	      cardioSessionsPerWeek: parseNumber(cardioSessionsPerWeek) ?? undefined,
   378	      cardioDurationMin: parseNumber(cardioDurationMin) ?? undefined,
   379	      bodyFatPct: parseNumber(bodyFatPct) ?? undefined,
   380	      bmrMeasuredKcal: parseNumber(bmrMeasuredKcal) ?? undefined,
   381	      sleepHours: parseNumber(sleepHours) ?? undefined,
   382	      stressLevel: parseNumber(stressLevel) ?? undefined,
   383	      caffeineDailyMg: parseNumber(caffeineDailyMg) ?? undefined,
   384	      alcoholWeekly: parseNumber(alcoholWeekly) ?? undefined,
   385	      menstrualPhase,
   386	    };
   387	  }
   388	
   389	  function handleCompute() {
   390	    const input = buildInput();
   391	    const issues = validatePublicTdeeInput(input);
   392	    if (issues.length > 0) {
   393	      setError(issues[0]?.message ?? 'Champs invalides.');
   394	      setPlan(null);
   395	      return false;
   396	    }
   397	
   398	    try {
   399	      const computed = computePublicTdeePlan(input);
   400	      setPlan(computed);
   401	      setError(null);
   402	      setStep(4);
   403	      return true;
   404	    } catch (err) {
   405	      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Impossible de calculer le plan.');
   406	      setPlan(null);
   407	      return false;
   408	    }
   409	  }
   410	
   411	  function handleNext() {
   412	    if (step === 3) {
   413	      handleCompute();
   414	      return;
   415	    }
   416	    const issues = validatePublicTdeeInput(buildInput());
   417	    if (issues.length > 0) {
   418	      setError(issues[0]?.message ?? 'Champs invalides.');
   419	      return;
   420	    }
   421	    setError(null);
   422	    setStep((current) => Math.min(4, (current + 1) as Step));
   423	  }
   424	
   425	  function handleBack() {
   426	    if (step === 4 && plan) {
   427	      setStep(3);
   428	      return;
   429	    }
   430	    setStep((current) => Math.max(1, (current - 1) as Step));
   431	  }
   432	
   433	  async function copySummary() {
   434	    if (!plan) return;
   435	    await copy(plan.exportText);
   436	  }
   437	
   438	  async function copyShareLink() {
   439	    if (!plan) return;
   440	    await copy(`${window.location.origin}${sharePath}`);
   441	  }
   442	
   443	  async function downloadJson() {
   444	    if (!plan) return;
   445	    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(plan, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
   446	    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   447	    const a = document.createElement('a');
   448	    a.href = url;
   449	    a.download = 'stryv-tdee-plan.json';
   450	    a.click();
   451	    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
   452	  }
   453	
   454	  const currentInput = buildInput();
   455	  const validationPreview = validatePublicTdeeInput(currentInput);
   456	
   457	  return (
   458	    <main className="min-h-screen bg-[#121212] text-white">
   459	      <div className="mx-auto max-w-6xl px-6 pb-24 pt-8 md:px-8">
   460	        <section className="mb-6 rounded-[28px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-[#181818] p-5 shadow-[0_20px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.18)] md:p-6">
   461	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between">
   462	            <div className="max-w-3xl space-y-4">
   463	              <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#1f8a65]">
   464	                <Sparkles size={12} />
   465	                Outil public expert
   466	              </div>
   467	              <div>
   468	                <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight md:text-4xl">Calcule ton TDEE réel, puis programme tes jours</h1>
   469	                <p className="mt-3 max-w-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   470	                  Un wizard hybride minimaliste avec BMR, NEAT, EAT, TEF, différenciation training/rest et sortie premium dépliable.
   471	                </p>
   472	              </div>
   473	              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/35">
   474	                <span className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1">2 min</span>
   475	                <span className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1">Mobile first</span>
   476	                <span className="rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1">Open source ready</span>
   477	              </div>
   478	            </div>
   479	
   480	            <div className="grid w-full max-w-sm gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   481	              <MetricCard label="Étape" value={step} suffix="/4" tone="green" />
   482	              <MetricCard label="Focus" value="Plan" suffix="complet" tone="amber" />
   483	              <MetricCard label="Sortie" value="Premium" suffix="dépliable" />
   484	            </div>
   485	          </div>
   486	        </section>
   487	
   488	        <section className="rounded-[28px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-[#181818] p-4 shadow-[0_20px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.16)] md:p-6">
   489	          <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
   490	            <div>
   491	              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">{STEP_META[step].label}</p>
   492	              <h2 className="mt-2 text-[18px] font-semibold text-white">{STEP_META[step].title}</h2>
   493	              <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-white/52">{STEP_META[step].desc}</p>
   494	            </div>
   495	            <div className="hidden items-center gap-2 md:flex">
   496	              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((value) => (
   497	                <div key={value} className={`h-2 w-12 rounded-full ${value <= step ? 'bg-[#1f8a65]' : 'bg-white/[0.06]'}`} />
   498	              ))}
   499	            </div>
   500	          </div>
   501	
   502	          {step !== 4 && (
   503	            <div className="mb-5 grid gap-2 text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.14em] md:grid-cols-4">
   504	              {([1, 2, 3, 4] as Step[]).map((value) => (
   505	                <button
   506	                  key={value}
   507	                  type="button"
   508	                  onClick={() => setStep(value)}
   509	                  className={`rounded-xl border px-3 py-2 text-left transition-colors ${
   510	                    value === step
   511	                      ? 'border-[#1f8a65]/25 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 text-white'
   512	                      : 'border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] text-white/40 hover:bg-white/[0.05] hover:text-white/70'
   513	                  }`}
   514	                >
   515	                  {STEP_META[value].label}
   516	                </button>
   517	              ))}
   518	            </div>
   519	          )}
   520	
   521	          {error && (
   522	            <div className="mb-4 rounded-2xl border border-red-500/20 bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-200">
   523	              {error}
   524	            </div>
   525	          )}
   526	
   527	          {step === 1 && (
   528	            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   529	              <div>
   530	                <FieldLabel>Sexe</FieldLabel>
   531	                <SelectField value={gender} onChange={setGender} options={GENDER_OPTIONS} />
   532	              </div>
   533	              <div>
   534	                <FieldLabel>Objectif</FieldLabel>
   535	                <SelectField value={goal} onChange={setGoal} options={GOAL_OPTIONS} />
   536	              </div>
   537	              <div>
   538	                <FieldLabel>Âge</FieldLabel>
   539	                <TextField value={age} onChange={setAge} type="number" min="15" max="85" placeholder="30" />
