   540	              </div>
   541	              <div>
   542	                <FieldLabel>Taille</FieldLabel>
   543	                <TextField value={heightCm} onChange={setHeightCm} type="number" min="140" max="220" placeholder="180" />
   544	              </div>
   545	              <div>
   546	                <FieldLabel>Poids</FieldLabel>
   547	                <TextField value={weightKg} onChange={setWeightKg} type="number" min="40" max="250" placeholder="80" />
   548	              </div>
   549	              <div>
   550	                <FieldLabel>Masse grasse estimée</FieldLabel>
   551	                <TextField value={bodyFatPct} onChange={setBodyFatPct} type="number" min="3" max="45" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   552	              </div>
   553	
   554	              <div className="md:col-span-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   555	                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   556	                  <CheckCircle2 size={16} className="mt-0.5 text-[#1f8a65]" />
   557	                  <div>
   558	                    <p className="text-[12px] font-semibold text-white">Le calcul reste possible sans masse grasse.</p>
   559	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/45">
   560	                      Si tu ne la renseignes pas, le moteur s’appuie sur une estimation conservatrice pour garder un plan exploitable.
   561	                    </p>
   562	                  </div>
   563	                </div>
   564	              </div>
   565	            </div>
   566	          )}
   567	
   568	          {step === 2 && (
   569	            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   570	              <div>
   571	                <FieldLabel>Pas par jour</FieldLabel>
   572	                <TextField value={dailySteps} onChange={setDailySteps} type="number" min="0" max="40000" placeholder="8000" />
   573	              </div>
   574	              <div>
   575	                <FieldLabel>Type de travail</FieldLabel>
   576	                <SelectField value={occupationMultiplier} onChange={setOccupationMultiplier} options={ACTIVITY_OPTIONS} />
   577	              </div>
   578	              <div>
   579	                <FieldLabel>Séances / semaine</FieldLabel>
   580	                <TextField value={workoutsPerWeek} onChange={setWorkoutsPerWeek} type="number" min="0" max="14" placeholder="4" />
   581	              </div>
   582	              <div>
   583	                <FieldLabel>Durée moyenne</FieldLabel>
   584	                <TextField value={sessionDurationMin} onChange={setSessionDurationMin} type="number" min="0" max="240" placeholder="60" />
   585	              </div>
   586	
   587	              <div className="md:col-span-2">
   588	                <button
   589	                  type="button"
   590	                  onClick={() => setAdvancedOpen((value) => !value)}
   591	                  className="mb-3 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/45 transition-colors hover:text-white/75"
   592	                >
   593	                  {advancedOpen ? <ChevronUp size={12} /> : <ChevronDown size={12} />}
   594	                  Affiner l’activité
   595	                </button>
   596	
   597	                {advancedOpen && (
   598	                  <div className="grid gap-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   599	                    <div>
   600	                      <FieldLabel>Cardio / semaine</FieldLabel>
   601	                      <TextField value={cardioSessionsPerWeek} onChange={setCardioSessionsPerWeek} type="number" min="0" max="14" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   602	                    </div>
   603	                    <div>
   604	                      <FieldLabel>Durée cardio</FieldLabel>
   605	                      <TextField value={cardioDurationMin} onChange={setCardioDurationMin} type="number" min="0" max="240" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   606	                    </div>
   607	                  </div>
   608	                )}
   609	              </div>
   610	            </div>
   611	          )}
   612	
   613	          {step === 3 && (
   614	            <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
   615	              <div>
   616	                <FieldLabel>BMR mesuré</FieldLabel>
   617	                <TextField value={bmrMeasuredKcal} onChange={setBmrMeasuredKcal} type="number" min="1000" max="4000" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   618	              </div>
   619	              <div>
   620	                <FieldLabel>Phase menstruelle</FieldLabel>
   621	                <SelectField value={menstrualPhase} onChange={setMenstrualPhase} options={PHASE_OPTIONS} />
   622	              </div>
   623	              <div>
   624	                <FieldLabel>Sommeil moyen</FieldLabel>
   625	                <TextField value={sleepHours} onChange={setSleepHours} type="number" min="0" max="16" placeholder="Optionnel" />
   626	              </div>
   627	              <div>
   628	                <FieldLabel>Stress ressenti</FieldLabel>
   629	                <TextField value={stressLevel} onChange={setStressLevel} type="number" min="1" max="10" placeholder="1 à 10" />
   630	              </div>
   631	              <div>
   632	                <FieldLabel>Caféine quotidienne</FieldLabel>
   633	                <TextField value={caffeineDailyMg} onChange={setCaffeineDailyMg} type="number" min="0" max="1200" placeholder="mg / jour" />
   634	              </div>
   635	              <div>
   636	                <FieldLabel>Alcool hebdo</FieldLabel>
   637	                <TextField value={alcoholWeekly} onChange={setAlcoholWeekly} type="number" min="0" max="30" placeholder="verres / semaine" />
   638	              </div>
   639	
   640	              <div className="md:col-span-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   641	                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   642	                  <BrainCircuit size={16} className="mt-0.5 text-[#1f8a65]" />
   643	                  <div>
   644	                    <p className="text-[12px] font-semibold text-white">Les champs experts améliorent la précision, ils ne bloquent pas le plan.</p>
   645	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/45">
   646	                      Le moteur applique les signaux utiles seulement s’ils existent. Sinon il reste conservateur et explicable.
   647	                    </p>
   648	                  </div>
   649	                </div>
   650	              </div>
   651	
   652	              <div className="md:col-span-2 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] px-4 py-3 text-[11px] text-white/50">
   653	                <ShieldCheck size={14} className="text-[#1f8a65]" />
   654	                Validation minimale actuelle: {validationPreview.length === 0 ? 'OK' : validationPreview[0]?.message}
   655	              </div>
   656	            </div>
   657	          )}
   658	
   659	          {step === 4 && plan && (
   660	            <div className="space-y-5">
   661	              <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   662	                <MetricCard label="Calories training" value={plan.split.trainingDayCalories} suffix="kcal" tone="green" />
   663	                <MetricCard label="Calories repos" value={plan.split.restDayCalories} suffix="kcal" tone="amber" />
   664	                <MetricCard label="Moyenne hebdo" value={plan.split.averageCalories} suffix="kcal" />
   665	              </div>
   666	
   667	              <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-4">
   668	                <MetricCard label="BMR" value={plan.result.breakdown.bmr} suffix="kcal" />
   669	                <MetricCard label="NEAT" value={plan.result.breakdown.neat} suffix="kcal" />
   670	                <MetricCard label="EAT" value={plan.result.breakdown.eat + plan.result.breakdown.eatCardio} suffix="kcal" />
   671	                <MetricCard label="TEF" value={Math.round(plan.result.breakdown.tef)} suffix="kcal" />
   672	              </div>
   673	
   674	              <section className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-2">
   675	                <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-5">
   676	                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
   677	                    <div>
   678	                      <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">Plan complet</p>
   679	                      <h3 className="mt-2 text-[24px] font-semibold text-white">{plan.split.averageCalories} kcal</h3>
   680	                      <p className="mt-2 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-white/50">
   681	                        {plan.input.goal === 'deficit'
   682	                          ? 'Programme orienté déficit avec jours training plus hauts et repos plus bas.'
   683	                          : plan.input.goal === 'surplus'
   684	                            ? 'Programme orienté surplus avec lissage hebdomadaire.'
   685	                            : 'Programme de maintenance avec répartition contrôlée des jours.'}
   686	                      </p>
   687	                    </div>
   688	                    <div className="rounded-full border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#1f8a65]">
   689	                      {plan.confidence.label}
   690	                    </div>
   691	                  </div>
   692	
   693	                  <div className="mt-4 grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   694	                    <div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] p-3">
   695	                      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Protéines</p>
   696	                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{plan.result.macros.p}g</p>
   697	                    </div>
   698	                    <div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] p-3">
   699	                      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Glucides</p>
   700	                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{plan.result.macros.c}g</p>
   701	                    </div>
   702	                    <div className="rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.02] p-3">
   703	                      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Lipides</p>
   704	                      <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{plan.result.macros.f}g</p>
   705	                    </div>
   706	                  </div>
   707	                </div>
   708	
   709	                <div className="space-y-3 rounded-[24px] border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-5">
   710	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/30">
   711	                    <Flame size={13} className="text-[#1f8a65]" />
   712	                    Répartition hebdo
   713	                  </div>
   714	                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   715	                    <MetricCard label="Jours training" value={plan.split.trainingDays} suffix="/7" />
   716	                    <MetricCard label="Jours repos" value={plan.split.restDays} suffix="/7" />
   717	                  </div>
   718	                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   719	                    <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/75">Macros training</p>
   720	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] text-white/45">
   721	                      {plan.split.trainingMacros.protein_g}g P · {plan.split.trainingMacros.carbs_g}g G · {plan.split.trainingMacros.fat_g}g L
   722	                    </p>
   723	                  </div>
   724	                  <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.02] p-4">
   725	                    <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/75">Macros repos</p>
   726	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[12px] text-white/45">
   727	                      {plan.split.restMacros.protein_g}g P · {plan.split.restMacros.carbs_g}g G · {plan.split.restMacros.fat_g}g L
   728	                    </p>
   729	                  </div>
   730	                </div>
   731	              </section>
   732	
   733	              <div className="grid gap-3 lg:grid-cols-2">
   734	                <Disclosure title="Déroulement premium" defaultOpen icon={BarChart3}>
   735	                  <div className="space-y-2 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   736	                    {plan.premiumSummary.map((line) => (
   737	                      <p key={line}>{line}</p>
   738	                    ))}
   739	                  </div>
   740	                </Disclosure>
   741	
   742	                <Disclosure title="Garde-fous et hypothèses" defaultOpen icon={ShieldCheck}>
   743	                  <div className="space-y-3">
   744	                    <div>
   745	                      <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Hypothèses</p>
   746	                      <ul className="mt-2 space-y-2 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   747	                        {plan.assumptions.map((item) => (
   748	                          <li key={item} className="flex gap-2">
   749	                            <span className="mt-1 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-white/30" />
   750	                            <span>{item}</span>
   751	                          </li>
   752	                        ))}
   753	                      </ul>
   754	                    </div>
   755	                    <div>
   756	                      <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">Garde-fous</p>
   757	                      <ul className="mt-2 space-y-2 text-[12px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   758	                        {plan.guardrails.map((item) => (
   759	                          <li key={item} className="flex gap-2">
   760	                            <span className="mt-1 h-1.5 w-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-[#1f8a65]" />
   761	                            <span>{item}</span>
   762	                          </li>
   763	                        ))}
   764	                      </ul>
   765	                    </div>
   766	                  </div>
   767	                </Disclosure>
   768	              </div>
   769	
   770	              <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
   771	                <button
   772	                  type="button"
   773	                  onClick={copySummary}
   774	                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   775	                >
   776	                  <Copy size={14} />
   777	                  Copier le résumé
   778	                </button>
   779	                  <button
   780	                  type="button"
   781	                  onClick={copyShareLink}
   782	                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   783	                >
   784	                  <Download size={14} />
   785	                  Copier le lien
   786	                </button>
   787	                <button
   788	                  type="button"
   789	                  onClick={downloadJson}
   790	                  className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   791	                >
   792	                  <Download size={14} />
   793	                  Export JSON
   794	                </button>
   795	              </div>
   796	
   797	              <div className="rounded-[24px] border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 p-5">
   798	                <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
   799	                  <div>
   800	                    <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-[#1f8a65]">Passerelle finale</p>
   801	                    <h3 className="mt-2 text-lg font-semibold text-white">Recevoir un cadrage plus poussé avec STRYV</h3>
   802	                    <p className="mt-1 text-[13px] leading-relaxed text-white/55">
   803	                      Tu as déjà le plan. Si tu veux le niveau au-dessus, passe à l’admission stratégique.
   804	                    </p>
   805	                  </div>
   806	                  <Link
   807	                    href="/omni/admission"
   808	                    className="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-[#1f8a65] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-[#197155]"
   809	                  >
   810	                    Aller plus loin avec STRYV
   811	                    <ArrowRight size={14} />
   812	                  </Link>
   813	                </div>
   814	              </div>
   815	
   816	              {copied && (
   817	                <div className="rounded-2xl border border-[#1f8a65]/20 bg-[#1f8a65]/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[#1f8a65]">
   818	                  Copié dans le presse-papiers.
   819	                </div>
   820	              )}
   821	            </div>
   822	          )}
   823	
   824	          <div className="mt-6 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
   825	            <button
   826	              type="button"
   827	              onClick={handleBack}
   828	              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/60 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.06] hover:text-white"
   829	            >
   830	              <ArrowLeft size={14} />
   831	              Retour
   832	            </button>
   833	
   834	            {step !== 4 ? (
   835	              <button
   836	                type="button"
   837	                onClick={handleNext}
   838	                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-[#1f8a65] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white transition-colors hover:bg-[#197155]"
   839	              >
   840	                {step === 3 ? 'Calculer mon plan' : 'Continuer'}
   841	                <ArrowRight size={14} />
   842	              </button>
   843	            ) : (
   844	              <button
   845	                type="button"
   846	                onClick={() => setStep(3)}
   847	                className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] px-4 py-3 text-[12px] font-semibold text-white/70 transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:text-white"
   848	              >
   849	                Modifier les données
   850	              </button>
   851	            )}
   852	          </div>
   853	        </section>
   854	
   855	        {step !== 4 && (
   856	          <div className="mt-5 rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4 text-[12px] text-white/45">
   857	            Le calcul reste exploitable avec un profil partiel. Les champs expert augmentent la précision mais ne bloquent pas la sortie.
   858	          </div>
   859	        )}
   860	      </div>
   861	    </main>
   862	  );
   863	}

------------------------------------------------------------
CANDIDATE: components/nutrition/studio/NutritionAnalysisPanel.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import {
     4	  CartesianGrid,
     5	  Line,
     6	  LineChart,
     7	  ResponsiveContainer,
     8	  Tooltip,
     9	  XAxis,
    10	  YAxis,
    11	} from "recharts";
    12	import { NUTRITION_UI_COLORS } from "@/lib/nutrition/ui-colors";
    13	import NutritionEnergyAnalytics from "@/components/clients/nutrition-hub/NutritionEnergyAnalytics";
    14	import NutritionRealityMiniDay from "./NutritionRealityMiniDay";
    15	import type { NutritionRealityView } from "./useNutritionReality";
    16	
    17	type NutritionAnalysisPanelProps = {
    18	  loading: boolean;
    19	  error: string | null;
    20	  activeWindow: 3 | 7;
    21	  onWindowChange: (window: 3 | 7) => void;
    22	  onOpenHub: () => void;
    23	  view: NutritionRealityView | null;
    24	};
    25	
    26	function formatPercent(value: number | null) {
    27	  return value == null ? "N/A" : `${Math.round(value * 100)}%`;
    28	}
    29	
    30	function getMetricTone(value: number | null) {
    31	  if (value == null) return "text-white";
    32	  if (value > 1.05) return "text-[#ff8660]";
    33	  if (value < 0.9) return "text-[#ffd15e]";
    34	  return "text-[#8ef0c7]";
    35	}
    36	
    37	function MetricCard({
    38	  label,
    39	  value,
    40	  accent,
    41	}: {
    42	  label: string;
    43	  value: number | null;
    44	  accent: string;
    45	}) {
    46	  return (
    47	    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3">
    48	      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.14em]" style={{ color: accent }}>
    49	        {label}
    50	      </p>
    51	      <p className={`mt-2 text-[22px] font-semibold ${getMetricTone(value)}`}>
    52	        {formatPercent(value)}
    53	      </p>
    54	    </div>
    55	  );
    56	}
    57	
    58	type TrendPoint = NutritionRealityView["trendPoints"][number];
    59	
    60	function formatShortDate(value: string) {
    61	  return new Date(value).toLocaleDateString("fr-FR", {
    62	    day: "numeric",
    63	    month: "short",
    64	  });
    65	}
    66	
    67	function MiniTooltip({
    68	  active,
    69	  payload,
    70	  label,
    71	  unit,
    72	  targetLabel,
    73	  consumedLabel,
    74	  accent,
    75	}: {
    76	  active?: boolean;
    77	  payload?: Array<{ dataKey?: string; value?: number; payload?: any }>;
    78	  label?: string;
    79	  unit: string;
    80	  targetLabel: string;
    81	  consumedLabel: string;
    82	  accent: string;
    83	}) {
    84	  if (!active || !payload?.length) return null;
    85	
    86	  const consumed = payload.find((entry) => entry.dataKey === "consumed");
    87	  const target = payload.find((entry) => entry.dataKey === "target");
    88	
    89	  return (
    90	    <div className="min-w-[180px] rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.08] bg-[#121212]/96 p-3 shadow-[0_18px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.45)]">
    91	      <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white/85">{label}</p>
    92	      <div className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-[11px]">
    93	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
    94	          <span className="text-white/55">{consumedLabel}</span>
    95	          <span className="font-medium text-white">
    96	            {Math.round(consumed?.value ?? 0)}
    97	            {unit}
    98	          </span>
    99	        </div>
   100	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
   101	          <span className="text-white/55">{targetLabel}</span>
   102	          <span className="font-medium" style={{ color: accent }}>
   103	            {Math.round(target?.value ?? 0)}
   104	            {unit}
   105	          </span>
   106	        </div>
   107	      </div>
   108	    </div>
   109	  );
   110	}
   111	
   112	function buildTrendRows(points: TrendPoint[], metric: keyof TrendPoint["consumed"]) {
   113	  return points.map((point) => ({
   114	    date: formatShortDate(point.date),
   115	    rawDate: point.date,
   116	    consumed: point.consumed[metric] ?? 0,
   117	    target: point.target[metric] ?? 0,
   118	  }));
   119	}
   120	
   121	function TrendMiniCard({
   122	  label,
   123	  accent,
   124	  unit,
   125	  targetLabel,
   126	  consumedLabel,
   127	  points,
   128	  metric,
   129	  tall = false,
   130	}: {
   131	  label: string;
   132	  accent: string;
   133	  unit: string;
   134	  targetLabel: string;
   135	  consumedLabel: string;
   136	  points: TrendPoint[];
   137	  metric: keyof TrendPoint["consumed"];
   138	  tall?: boolean;
   139	}) {
   140	  const data = buildTrendRows(points, metric);
   141	
   142	  return (
   143	    <div className="rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3">
   144	      <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.14em] text-white/35">
   145	        Consommé vs réel
   146	      </p>
   147	      <p className="mt-1 text-[18px] font-semibold text-white">{label}</p>
   148	      <div className={tall ? "mt-3 h-44" : "mt-3 h-28"}>
   149	        <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
   150	          <LineChart data={data}>
   151	            <CartesianGrid stroke="#ffffff10" vertical={false} />
   152	            <XAxis
   153	              dataKey="date"
   154	              stroke="#ffffff45"
   155	              tickLine={false}
   156	              axisLine={false}
   157	              tick={{ fontSize: 10 }}
   158	            />
   159	            <YAxis
   160	              stroke="#ffffff45"
   161	              tickLine={false}
   162	              axisLine={false}
   163	              tick={{ fontSize: 10 }}
   164	              width={34}
   165	            />
   166	            <Tooltip
   167	              content={
   168	                <MiniTooltip
   169	                  unit={unit}
   170	                  targetLabel={targetLabel}
   171	                  consumedLabel={consumedLabel}
   172	                  accent={accent}
   173	                />
   174	              }
   175	            />
   176	            <Line
   177	              type="monotone"
   178	              dataKey="consumed"
   179	              stroke={accent}
   180	              strokeWidth={2.4}
   181	              dot={false}
   182	            />
   183	            <Line
   184	              type="monotone"
   185	              dataKey="target"
   186	              stroke="#d9f3e5"
   187	              strokeWidth={1.8}
   188	              dot={false}
   189	            />
   190	          </LineChart>
   191	        </ResponsiveContainer>
   192	      </div>
   193	    </div>
   194	  );
   195	}
   196	
   197	export default function NutritionAnalysisPanel({
   198	  loading,
   199	  error,
   200	  activeWindow,
   201	  onWindowChange,
   202	  onOpenHub,
   203	  view,
   204	}: NutritionAnalysisPanelProps) {
   205	  if (loading) {
   206	    return (
   207	      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4">
   208	        <div className="space-y-4 animate-pulse">
   209	          <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   210	            <div className="h-3 w-28 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   211	            <div className="mt-4 h-10 w-24 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   212	            <div className="mt-3 h-3 w-full rounded bg-white/[0.05]" />
   213	            <div className="mt-2 h-3 w-4/5 rounded bg-white/[0.05]" />
   214	          </div>
   215	          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   216	            {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, index) => (
   217	              <div
   218	                key={index}
   219	                className="rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-3"
   220	              >
   221	                <div className="h-3 w-16 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   222	                <div className="mt-3 h-7 w-16 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   223	                <div className="mt-2 h-3 w-full rounded bg-white/[0.05]" />
   224	              </div>
   225	            ))}
   226	          </div>
   227	          <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   228	            <div className="h-3 w-24 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   229	            <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
   230	              <div className="h-16 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.05]" />
   231	              <div className="h-16 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.05]" />
   232	            </div>
   233	          </div>
   234	          <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   235	            <div className="h-3 w-32 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   236	            <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   237	              {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, index) => (
   238	                <div key={index} className="rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] p-3">
   239	                  <div className="h-3 w-24 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   240	                  <div className="mt-2 h-5 w-20 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   241	                  <div className="mt-3 h-24 rounded bg-white/[0.05]" />
   242	                </div>
   243	              ))}
   244	            </div>
   245	            <div className="mt-3 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] p-3">
   246	              <div className="h-3 w-24 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   247	              <div className="mt-2 h-5 w-20 rounded bg-white/[0.06]" />
   248	              <div className="mt-3 h-36 rounded bg-white/[0.05]" />
   249	            </div>
   250	          </div>
   251	        </div>
   252	      </div>
   253	    );
   254	  }
   255	
   256	  if (error) {
   257	    return (
   258	      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4">
   259	        <div className="rounded-2xl border border-red-400/20 bg-red-400/10 p-4">
   260	          <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Analyse indisponible</p>
   261	          <p className="mt-2 text-[11px] leading-relaxed text-red-200/80">{error}</p>
   262	        </div>
   263	      </div>
   264	    );
   265	  }
   266	
   267	  if (!view) {
   268	    return (
   269	      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4">
   270	        <div className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   271	          <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white">
   272	            Pas encore assez de données nutritionnelles
   273	          </p>
   274	          <p className="mt-2 text-[10px] leading-relaxed text-white/50">
   275	            Les journées réelles apparaîtront ici dès que le client loguera repas et
   276	            hydratation.
   277	          </p>
   278	        </div>
   279	      </div>
   280	    );
   281	  }
   282	
   283	  return (
   284	    <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4 pb-10">
   285	      <div className="space-y-4">
   286	        <section className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   287	          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
   288	            <div>
   289	              <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/35">
   290	                Analyse nutritionnelle
   291	              </p>
   292	              <p className="mt-1 text-[11px] text-white/45">
   293	                Lecture de la réalité observée pendant la construction du protocole.
   294	              </p>
   295	            </div>
   296	            <button
   297	              onClick={onOpenHub}
   298	              className="rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-white/60 transition-colors hover:text-white/80"
   299	            >
   300	              Ouvrir le hub
   301	            </button>
   302	          </div>
   303	
   304	          <div className="mt-4 flex items-end justify-between gap-3">
   305	            <div>
   306	              <p className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35">
   307	                Score global nutrition
   308	              </p>
   309	              <p className="mt-1 text-[30px] font-semibold text-white">
   310	                {formatPercent(view.summary.nutritionScore)}
   311	              </p>
   312	            </div>
   313	            <div className="flex gap-2">
   314	              {view.availableWindows.map((windowValue) => (
   315	                <button
   316	                  key={windowValue}
   317	                  onClick={() => onWindowChange(windowValue)}
   318	                  className={`rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] ${
   319	                    activeWindow === windowValue
   320	                      ? "bg-[#1f8a65] text-white"
   321	                      : "bg-white/[0.04] text-white/55"
   322	                  }`}
   323	                >
   324	                  {windowValue}j
   325	                </button>
   326	              ))}
   327	            </div>
   328	          </div>
   329	
   330	          <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   331	            <MetricCard
   332	              label="Calories"
   333	              value={view.summary.achievedCalories}
   334	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.calories}
   335	            />
   336	            <MetricCard
   337	              label="Protéines"
   338	              value={view.summary.achievedProtein}
   339	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein}
   340	            />
   341	            <MetricCard
   342	              label="Glucides"
   343	              value={view.summary.achievedCarbs}
   344	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs}
   345	            />
   346	            <MetricCard
   347	              label="Lipides"
   348	              value={view.summary.achievedFat}
   349	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat}
   350	            />
   351	            <div className="col-span-2">
   352	              <MetricCard
   353	                label="Hydratation"
   354	                value={view.summary.achievedHydration}
   355	                accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.water}
   356	              />
   357	            </div>
   358	          </div>
   359	        </section>
   360	
   361	        <section className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   362	          <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/35">
   363	            Bloc énergie
   364	          </p>
   365	          <div className="mt-4">
   366	            {view.energy ? (
   367	              <NutritionEnergyAnalytics points={view.trendPoints} energy={view.energy} />
   368	            ) : (
   369	              <div className="rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   370	                <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white">
   371	                  Analyse énergie indisponible
   372	                </p>
   373	                <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] leading-relaxed text-white/50">
   374	                  La dépense énergétique devient visible quand le hub renvoie le TDEE et
   375	                  l’historique associé.
   376	                </p>
   377	              </div>
   378	            )}
   379	          </div>
   380	        </section>
   381	
   382	        <section className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   383	          <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/35">
   384	            Signaux clés
   385	          </p>
   386	          <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
   387	            {view.topInsights.length > 0 ? (
   388	              view.topInsights.map((insight) => (
   389	                <div key={insight.id} className="rounded-xl bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-2.5">
   390	                  <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white">{insight.title}</p>
   391	                  <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] text-white/50">{insight.message}</p>
   392	                </div>
   393	              ))
   394	            ) : (
   395	              <div className="rounded-xl border border-dashed border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.03] px-3 py-3">
   396	                <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-white">
   397	                  Aucun signal prioritaire sur la fenêtre active.
   398	                </p>
   399	                <p className="mt-1 text-[10px] leading-relaxed text-white/50">
   400	                  Les données observées ne montrent pas d’alerte nutritionnelle majeure à
   401	                  ce stade.
   402	                </p>
   403	              </div>
   404	            )}
   405	          </div>
   406	        </section>
   407	
   408	        <section className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   409	          <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/35">
   410	            Consommé vs réel
   411	          </p>
   412	          <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
   413	            <TrendMiniCard
   414	              label="Calories"
   415	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.calories}
   416	              unit=" kcal"
   417	              targetLabel="Cible"
   418	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   419	              points={view.trendPoints}
   420	              metric="calories"
   421	            />
   422	            <TrendMiniCard
   423	              label="Protéines"
   424	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.protein}
   425	              unit=" g"
   426	              targetLabel="Cible"
   427	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   428	              points={view.trendPoints}
   429	              metric="protein_g"
   430	            />
   431	            <TrendMiniCard
   432	              label="Glucides"
   433	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.carbs}
   434	              unit=" g"
   435	              targetLabel="Cible"
   436	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   437	              points={view.trendPoints}
   438	              metric="carbs_g"
   439	            />
   440	            <TrendMiniCard
   441	              label="Lipides"
   442	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.fat}
   443	              unit=" g"
   444	              targetLabel="Cible"
   445	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   446	              points={view.trendPoints}
   447	              metric="fat_g"
   448	            />
   449	          </div>
   450	          <div className="mt-3">
   451	            <TrendMiniCard
   452	              label="Hydratation"
   453	              accent={NUTRITION_UI_COLORS.water}
   454	              unit=" ml"
   455	              targetLabel="Cible"
   456	              consumedLabel="Consommé"
   457	              points={view.trendPoints}
   458	              metric="hydration_ml"
   459	              tall
   460	            />
   461	          </div>
   462	        </section>
   463	
   464	        <section className="rounded-2xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-white/[0.03] p-4">
   465	          <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-white/35">
   466	            Dernières journées observées
   467	          </p>
   468	          <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
   469	            {view.recentDays.map((day) => (
   470	              <NutritionRealityMiniDay key={day.date} day={day} />
   471	            ))}
   472	          </div>
   473	        </section>
   474	      </div>
   475	    </div>
   476	  );
   477	}

------------------------------------------------------------
CANDIDATE: components/nutrition/studio/ParameterAdjustmentPanel.tsx
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	"use client";
     2	
     3	import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
     4	import { ChevronLeft, X, Calculator, Check, AlertTriangle } from "lucide-react";
     5	import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
     6	import type { NutritionClientData } from "@/lib/nutrition/types";
     7	import type { TrainingConfig, LifestyleConfig } from "./useNutritionStudio";
     8	import type { BMRSource } from "@/lib/nutrition/calculators";
     9	import {
    10	  calculateBMRKatchMcArdle,
    11	  calculateBMRMifflin,
    12	  calculateLBMFromBF,
    13	  describeBMRFormula,
    14	} from "@/lib/nutrition/calculators";
    15	
    16	interface BiometricsConfig {
    17	  weight_kg: number | null;
    18	  height_cm: number | null;
    19	  body_fat_pct: number | null;
    20	  lean_mass_kg: number | null;
    21	  muscle_mass_kg: number | null;
    22	  visceral_fat_level: number | null;
    23	  bmr_kcal_measured: number | null;
    24	  bmr_source: BMRSource;
    25	}
    26	
    27	interface Props {
    28	  isOpen: boolean;
    29	  onClose: () => void;
    30	  clientData: NutritionClientData | null;
    31	  onUpdateTraining: (field: string, value: string) => void;
    32	  onUpdateLifestyle: (field: string, value: string) => void;
    33	  onUpdateBiometrics: (field: string, value: string | BMRSource) => void;
    34	  trainingConfig: TrainingConfig;
    35	  lifestyleConfig: LifestyleConfig;
    36	  biometricsConfig: BiometricsConfig;
    37	}
    38	
    39	function NumberInput({
    40	  label,
    41	  value,
    42	  onChange,
    43	  unit,
    44	  onBlur,
    45	}: {
    46	  label: string;
    47	  value: string | number | null;
    48	  onChange: (v: string) => void;
    49	  unit?: string;
    50	  onBlur?: () => void;
    51	}) {
    52	  return (
    53	    <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-white/[0.03]">
    54	      <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50">{label}</span>
    55	      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
    56	        <input
    57	          type="number"
    58	          value={value ?? ""}
    59	          onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
    60	          onBlur={onBlur}
    61	          placeholder="—"
    62	          className="w-20 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-2 py-1 text-[11px] text-white text-right outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-[#1f8a65]/40"
    63	        />
    64	        {unit && <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 w-6">{unit}</span>}
    65	      </div>
    66	    </div>
    67	  );
    68	}
    69	
    70	function SectionLabel({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    71	  return (
    72	    <p className="text-[9px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-white/35 mt-4 mb-2">
    73	      {children}
    74	    </p>
    75	  );
    76	}
    77	
    78	function SourceBadge({ source }: { source: BMRSource }) {
    79	  const colors = {
    80	    measured: "bg-green-500/20 text-green-400",
    81	    estimated: "bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400",
    82	    calculated: "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400",
    83	  };
    84	  const labels = {
    85	    measured: "Mesurée",
    86	    estimated: "Estimée",
    87	    calculated: "Calculée",
    88	  };
    89	  return (
    90	    <span
    91	      className={`inline-block px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[8px] font-semibold ${colors[source]}`}
    92	    >
    93	      {labels[source]}
    94	    </span>
    95	  );
    96	}
    97	
    98	export default function ParameterAdjustmentPanel({
    99	  isOpen,
   100	  onClose,
   101	  clientData,
   102	  onUpdateTraining,
   103	  onUpdateLifestyle,
   104	  onUpdateBiometrics,
   105	  trainingConfig,
   106	  lifestyleConfig,
   107	  biometricsConfig,
   108	}: Props) {
   109	  const [showBMRCalculator, setShowBMRCalculator] = useState(false);
   110	  const [bmrFormula, setBMRFormula] = useState<
   111	    "katch-mcardle" | "mifflin-st-jeor"
   112	  >("katch-mcardle");
   113	  const [bmrResult, setBMRResult] = useState<number | null>(null);
   114	  const [saved, setSaved] = useState(false);
   115	  const [heightInput, setHeightInput] = useState<string>(
   116	    biometricsConfig.height_cm?.toString() ?? ""
   117	  );
   118	  const saveTimeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
   119	
   120	  // Auto-save debounce 500ms
   121	  const triggerAutoSave = () => {
   122	    setSaved(false);
   123	    if (saveTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimeoutRef.current);
   124	    saveTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   125	      setSaved(true);
   126	      setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 2000);
   127	    }, 500);
   128	  };
   129	
   130	  // Cleanup timeout on unmount
   131	  useEffect(() => {
   132	    return () => {
   133	      if (saveTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimeoutRef.current);
   134	    };
   135	  }, []);
   136	
   137	  // Update height input when biometricsConfig changes
   138	  useEffect(() => {
   139	    setHeightInput(biometricsConfig.height_cm?.toString() ?? "");
   140	  }, [biometricsConfig.height_cm]);
   141	
   142	  const handleCalculateBMR = () => {
   143	    let result: number | null = null;
   144	
   145	    if (
   146	      bmrFormula === "katch-mcardle" &&
   147	      biometricsConfig.weight_kg &&
   148	      biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct !== null
   149	    ) {
   150	      result = calculateBMRKatchMcArdle(
   151	        biometricsConfig.weight_kg,
   152	        biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct,
   153	      );
   154	    } else if (
   155	      bmrFormula === "mifflin-st-jeor" &&
   156	      biometricsConfig.weight_kg &&
   157	      biometricsConfig.height_cm &&
   158	      clientData?.age
   159	    ) {
   160	      result = calculateBMRMifflin(
   161	        biometricsConfig.weight_kg,
   162	        biometricsConfig.height_cm,
   163	        clientData.age,
   164	        clientData.gender === "female"
   165	          ? "F"
   166	          : clientData.gender === "male"
   167	            ? "M"
   168	            : null,
   169	      );
   170	    }
   171	
   172	    if (result) {
   173	      setBMRResult(result);
   174	    }
   175	  };
   176	
   177	  const handleApplyBMR = () => {
   178	    if (bmrResult) {
   179	      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_kcal_measured", bmrResult.toString());
   180	      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_source", "calculated");
   181	      setShowBMRCalculator(false);
   182	      setBMRResult(null);
   183	    }
   184	  };
   185	
   186	  return (
   187	    <AnimatePresence>
   188	      {isOpen && (
   189	        <>
   190	          {/* Backdrop */}
   191	          <motion.div
   192	            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
   193	            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
   194	            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
   195	            onClick={onClose}
   196	            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-40"
   197	          />
   198	
   199	          {/* Panel */}
   200	          <motion.div
   201	            initial={{ x: 400, opacity: 0 }}
   202	            animate={{ x: 0, opacity: 1 }}
   203	            exit={{ x: 400, opacity: 0 }}
   204	            transition={{ type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 }}
   205	            className="fixed right-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[400px] bg-[#181818] z-50 flex flex-col border-l border-white/[0.06]"
   206	          >
   207	            {/* Header */}
   208	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/[0.06]">
   209	              <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white">
   210	                Ajuster les paramètres
   211	              </h3>
   212	              <button
   213	                onClick={onClose}
   214	                className="text-white/40 hover:text-white/70 transition-colors"
   215	              >
   216	                <X size={16} />
   217	              </button>
   218	            </div>
   219	
   220	            {/* Scrollable content */}
   221	            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto scrollbar-hide p-4 space-y-0">
   222	              {/* Height quick-add if missing */}
   223	              {!biometricsConfig.height_cm && (
   224	                <div className="bg-amber-500/15 border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/30 rounded-lg p-3 mb-4">
   225	                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
   226	                    <AlertTriangle size={14} className="text-amber-400 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
   227	                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   228	                      <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-amber-300 mb-2">
   229	                        Taille manquante
   230	                      </p>
   231	                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   232	                        <input
   233	                          type="number"
   234	                          value={heightInput}
   235	                          onChange={(e) => setHeightInput(e.target.value)}
   236	                          placeholder="170"
   237	                          className="flex-1 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/40 px-2 py-1 text-[10px] text-white outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-amber-500/60"
   238	                        />
   239	                        <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35">cm</span>
   240	                        <button
   241	                          onClick={() => {
   242	                            if (heightInput) {
   243	                              onUpdateBiometrics("height_cm", heightInput);
   244	                              triggerAutoSave();
   245	                            }
   246	                          }}
   247	                          className="rounded-lg bg-amber-500/30 border-[0.3px] border-amber-500/50 px-2 py-1 text-[9px] font-medium text-amber-300 hover:bg-amber-500/40 transition-all"
   248	                        >
   249	                          ✓
   250	                        </button>
   251	                      </div>
   252	                    </div>
   253	                  </div>
   254	                </div>
   255	              )}
   256	
   257	              {/* Training Section */}
   258	              <SectionLabel>Entraînement</SectionLabel>
   259	              <NumberInput
   260	                label="Fréquence hebdomadaire"
   261	                value={trainingConfig.weeklyFrequency ?? ""}
   262	                onChange={(v) => {
   263	                  onUpdateTraining("weekly_frequency", v);
   264	                  triggerAutoSave();
   265	                }}
   266	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   267	                unit="jours"
   268	              />
   269	              <NumberInput
   270	                label="Durée séance"
   271	                value={trainingConfig.sessionDurationMin ?? ""}
   272	                onChange={(v) => {
   273	                  onUpdateTraining("session_duration_min", v);
   274	                  triggerAutoSave();
   275	                }}
   276	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   277	                unit="min"
   278	              />
   279	              <NumberInput
   280	                label="Calories entraînement"
   281	                value={trainingConfig.trainingCaloriesWeekly ?? ""}
   282	                onChange={(v) => {
   283	                  onUpdateTraining("training_calories_weekly", v);
   284	                  triggerAutoSave();
   285	                }}
   286	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   287	                unit="kcal"
   288	              />
   289	              <NumberInput
   290	                label="Fréquence cardio"
   291	                value={trainingConfig.cardioFrequency ?? ""}
   292	                onChange={(v) => {
   293	                  onUpdateTraining("cardio_frequency", v);
   294	                  triggerAutoSave();
   295	                }}
   296	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   297	                unit="séances"
   298	              />
   299	              <NumberInput
   300	                label="Durée cardio"
   301	                value={trainingConfig.cardioDurationMin ?? ""}
   302	                onChange={(v) => {
   303	                  onUpdateTraining("cardio_duration_min", v);
   304	                  triggerAutoSave();
   305	                }}
   306	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   307	                unit="min"
   308	              />
   309	              <NumberInput
   310	                label="Étapes quotidiennes"
   311	                value={trainingConfig.dailySteps ?? ""}
   312	                onChange={(v) => {
   313	                  onUpdateTraining("daily_steps", v);
   314	                  triggerAutoSave();
   315	                }}
   316	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   317	                unit="pas"
   318	              />
   319	
   320	              {/* Lifestyle Section */}
   321	              <SectionLabel>Hygiène de vie</SectionLabel>
   322	              <NumberInput
   323	                label="Heures sommeil"
   324	                value={lifestyleConfig.sleepDurationH ?? ""}
   325	                onChange={(v) => {
   326	                  onUpdateLifestyle("sleep_duration_h", v);
   327	                  triggerAutoSave();
   328	                }}
   329	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   330	                unit="h"
   331	              />
   332	              <NumberInput
   333	                label="Qualité sommeil"
   334	                value={lifestyleConfig.sleepQuality ?? ""}
   335	                onChange={(v) => {
   336	                  onUpdateLifestyle("sleep_quality", v);
   337	                  triggerAutoSave();
   338	                }}
   339	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   340	                unit="/ 10"
   341	              />
   342	              <NumberInput
   343	                label="Niveau de stress"
   344	                value={lifestyleConfig.stressLevel ?? ""}
   345	                onChange={(v) => {
   346	                  onUpdateLifestyle("stress_level", v);
   347	                  triggerAutoSave();
   348	                }}
   349	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   350	                unit="/ 10"
   351	              />
   352	              <NumberInput
   353	                label="Heures travail"
   354	                value={lifestyleConfig.workHoursPerWeek ?? ""}
   355	                onChange={(v) => {
   356	                  onUpdateLifestyle("work_hours_per_week", v);
   357	                  triggerAutoSave();
   358	                }}
   359	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   360	                unit="h"
   361	              />
   362	              <NumberInput
   363	                label="Caféine quotidienne"
   364	                value={lifestyleConfig.caffeineDailyMg ?? ""}
   365	                onChange={(v) => {
   366	                  onUpdateLifestyle("caffeine_daily_mg", v);
   367	                  triggerAutoSave();
   368	                }}
   369	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   370	                unit="mg"
   371	              />
   372	              <NumberInput
   373	                label="Alcool hebdomadaire"
   374	                value={lifestyleConfig.alcoholWeekly ?? ""}
   375	                onChange={(v) => {
   376	                  onUpdateLifestyle("alcohol_weekly", v);
   377	                  triggerAutoSave();
   378	                }}
   379	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   380	                unit="verre"
   381	              />
   382	
   383	              {/* Biometrics Section */}
   384	              <SectionLabel>Composition corporelle</SectionLabel>
   385	              <NumberInput
   386	                label="Poids"
   387	                value={biometricsConfig.weight_kg ?? ""}
   388	                onChange={(v) => {
   389	                  onUpdateBiometrics("weight_kg", v);
   390	                  triggerAutoSave();
   391	                }}
   392	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   393	                unit="kg"
   394	              />
   395	              <NumberInput
   396	                label="Taille"
   397	                value={biometricsConfig.height_cm ?? ""}
   398	                onChange={(v) => {
   399	                  onUpdateBiometrics("height_cm", v);
   400	                  triggerAutoSave();
   401	                }}
   402	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   403	                unit="cm"
   404	              />
   405	              <NumberInput
   406	                label="Graisse corporelle"
   407	                value={biometricsConfig.body_fat_pct ?? ""}
   408	                onChange={(v) => {
   409	                  onUpdateBiometrics("body_fat_pct", v);
   410	                  triggerAutoSave();
   411	                }}
   412	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   413	                unit="%"
   414	              />
   415	              <NumberInput
   416	                label="Masse maigre"
   417	                value={biometricsConfig.lean_mass_kg ?? ""}
   418	                onChange={(v) => {
   419	                  onUpdateBiometrics("lean_mass_kg", v);
   420	                  triggerAutoSave();
   421	                }}
   422	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   423	                unit="kg"
   424	              />
   425	              <NumberInput
   426	                label="Masse musculaire"
   427	                value={biometricsConfig.muscle_mass_kg ?? ""}
   428	                onChange={(v) => {
   429	                  onUpdateBiometrics("muscle_mass_kg", v);
   430	                  triggerAutoSave();
   431	                }}
   432	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   433	                unit="kg"
   434	              />
   435	              <NumberInput
   436	                label="Graisse viscérale"
   437	                value={biometricsConfig.visceral_fat_level ?? ""}
   438	                onChange={(v) => {
   439	                  onUpdateBiometrics("visceral_fat_level", v);
   440	                  triggerAutoSave();
   441	                }}
   442	                onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   443	                unit="level"
   444	              />
   445	
   446	              {/* Metabolism Section */}
   447	              <SectionLabel>Métabolisme</SectionLabel>
   448	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-white/[0.03]">
   449	                <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   450	                  <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50">
   451	                    BMR
   452	                  </span>
   453	                  <SourceBadge source={biometricsConfig.bmr_source} />
   454	                </div>
   455	                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   456	                  <input
   457	                    type="number"
   458	                    value={biometricsConfig.bmr_kcal_measured ?? ""}
   459	                    onChange={(e) => {
   460	                      onUpdateBiometrics("bmr_kcal_measured", e.target.value);
   461	                      triggerAutoSave();
   462	                    }}
   463	                    onBlur={triggerAutoSave}
   464	                    placeholder="—"
   465	                    className="w-20 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] px-2 py-1 text-[11px] text-white text-right outline-none placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-[#1f8a65]/40"
   466	                  />
   467	                  <span className="text-[9px] text-white/35 w-6">kcal</span>
   468	                </div>
   469	              </div>
   470	
   471	              {/* Calculate Button */}
   472	              <button
   473	                onClick={() => setShowBMRCalculator(true)}
   474	                className="mt-3 w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-blue-500/40 text-[11px] font-medium text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-all"
   475	              >
   476	                <Calculator size={14} />
   477	                Calculer le BMR
   478	              </button>
   479	            </div>
   480	
   481	            {/* Footer */}
   482	            <div className="border-t border-white/[0.06] p-4 flex gap-2">
   483	              <button
   484	                onClick={onClose}
   485	                className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] text-[11px] font-medium text-white/60 hover:text-white/80 transition-all"
   486	              >
   487	                <X size={12} />
   488	                Fermer
   489	              </button>
   490	              <button
   491	                onClick={onClose}
   492	                className={`flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-[11px] font-medium transition-all ${
   493	                  saved
   494	                    ? "bg-green-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-green-500/40 text-green-300"
   495	                    : "bg-[#1f8a65] border-[0.3px] border-[#1f8a65] text-white hover:bg-[#217356]"
   496	                }`}
   497	              >
   498	                {saved ? (
   499	                  <>
   500	                    <Check size={12} />
   501	                    Enregistré
   502	                  </>
   503	                ) : (
   504	                  <>
   505	                    <ChevronLeft size={12} />
   506	                    Fait, retour
   507	                  </>
   508	                )}
   509	              </button>
   510	            </div>
   511	          </motion.div>
   512	
   513	          {/* BMR Calculator Modal */}
   514	          {showBMRCalculator && (
   515	            <motion.div
   516	              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
   517	              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
   518	              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
   519	              className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4"
   520	              onClick={() => setShowBMRCalculator(false)}
   521	            >
   522	              <div
   523	                className="bg-[#181818] rounded-2xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06]"
   524	                onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
   525	              >
   526	                <h4 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-white mb-4">
   527	                  Calculer le BMR
   528	                </h4>
   529	
   530	                {/* Formula selection */}
   531	                <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
   532	                  <label className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-white/50 uppercase">
   533	                    Formule
   534	                  </label>
   535	                  <div className="flex gap-2">
   536	                    {(["katch-mcardle", "mifflin-st-jeor"] as const).map(
   537	                      (formula) => (
   538	                        <button
   539	                          key={formula}
   540	                          onClick={() => setBMRFormula(formula)}
   541	                          className={`flex-1 py-1.5 px-2 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-medium transition-all ${
   542	                            bmrFormula === formula
   543	                              ? "bg-blue-500/30 border-[0.3px] border-blue-500/60 text-blue-300"
   544	                              : "bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] text-white/60 hover:text-white/80"
   545	                          }`}
   546	                        >
   547	                          {formula === "katch-mcardle"
   548	                            ? "Katch-McArdle"
   549	                            : "Mifflin-St Jeor"}
   550	                        </button>
   551	                      ),
   552	                    )}
   553	                  </div>
   554	                  <p className="text-[9px] text-white/40 mt-1">
   555	                    {describeBMRFormula(bmrFormula)}
   556	                  </p>
   557	                </div>
   558	
   559	                {/* Result display */}
   560	                {bmrResult && (
   561	                  <div className="bg-white/[0.04] rounded-lg p-3 mb-4 border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06]">
   562	                    <p className="text-[10px] text-white/50 mb-1">
   563	                      Résultat estimé
   564	                    </p>
   565	                    <p className="text-[18px] font-bold text-green-400">
   566	                      {bmrResult} kcal
   567	                    </p>
   568	                  </div>
   569	                )}
   570	
   571	                {/* Buttons */}
   572	                <div className="flex gap-2">
   573	                  <button
   574	                    onClick={() => {
   575	                      handleCalculateBMR();
   576	                    }}
   577	                    className="flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-blue-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-blue-500/40 text-[11px] font-medium text-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-500/30 transition-all"
   578	                  >
   579	                    Calculer
   580	                  </button>
   581	                  <button
   582	                    onClick={handleApplyBMR}
   583	                    disabled={!bmrResult}
   584	                    className="flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-green-500/20 border-[0.3px] border-green-500/40 text-[11px] font-medium text-green-300 hover:bg-green-500/30 disabled:opacity-50 transition-all"
   585	                  >
   586	                    Appliquer
   587	                  </button>
   588	                  <button
   589	                    onClick={() => {
   590	                      setShowBMRCalculator(false);
   591	                      setBMRResult(null);
   592	                    }}
   593	                    className="flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.04] border-[0.3px] border-white/[0.06] text-[11px] font-medium text-white/60 hover:text-white/80 transition-all"
   594	                  >
   595	                    Fermer
   596	                  </button>
   597	                </div>
   598	              </div>
   599	            </motion.div>
   600	          )}
   601	        </>
   602	      )}
   603	    </AnimatePresence>
   604	  );
   605	}

CANDIDATE: lib/client/nutrition/drinks.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type DrinkType = "water" | "espresso" | "coffee" | "lungo" | "tea"
     2	export type DrinkLogKind = "all" | "water" | "caffeine"
     3	
     4	export type DrinkPreset = {
     5	  drinkType: DrinkType
     6	  label: string
     7	  shortLabel: string
     8	  baseAmountMl: number
     9	  baseCaffeineMg: number
    10	  accent: string
    11	  cupCount: 1 | 2 | 3
    12	  strengthLabel: string
    13	}
    14	
    15	export const DRINK_PRESETS: Record<DrinkType, DrinkPreset> = {
    16	  water: {
    17	    drinkType: "water",
    18	    label: "Eau",
    19	    shortLabel: "Eau",
    20	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    21	    baseCaffeineMg: 0,
    22	    accent: "#60a5fa",
    23	    cupCount: 1,
    24	    strengthLabel: "hydratation",
    25	  },
    26	  espresso: {
    27	    drinkType: "espresso",
    28	    label: "Espresso",
    29	    shortLabel: "Espresso",
    30	    baseAmountMl: 40,
    31	    baseCaffeineMg: 80,
    32	    accent: "#c08457",
    33	    cupCount: 1,
    34	    strengthLabel: "concentré",
    35	  },
    36	  coffee: {
    37	    drinkType: "coffee",
    38	    label: "Café",
    39	    shortLabel: "Café",
    40	    baseAmountMl: 180,
    41	    baseCaffeineMg: 95,
    42	    accent: "#c08457",
    43	    cupCount: 2,
    44	    strengthLabel: "classique",
    45	  },
    46	  lungo: {
    47	    drinkType: "lungo",
    48	    label: "Lungo",
    49	    shortLabel: "Lungo",
    50	    baseAmountMl: 120,
    51	    baseCaffeineMg: 110,
    52	    accent: "#c08457",
    53	    cupCount: 3,
    54	    strengthLabel: "allongé",
    55	  },
    56	  tea: {
    57	    drinkType: "tea",
    58	    label: "Thé",
    59	    shortLabel: "Thé",
    60	    baseAmountMl: 250,
    61	    baseCaffeineMg: 35,
    62	    accent: "#34d399",
    63	    cupCount: 1,
    64	    strengthLabel: "infusé",
    65	  },
    66	}
    67	
    68	const CAFFEINATED_TYPES: Exclude<DrinkType, "water">[] = ["espresso", "coffee", "lungo", "tea"]
    69	
    70	export function isCaffeinatedDrinkType(type: DrinkType): type is Exclude<DrinkType, "water"> {
    71	  return CAFFEINATED_TYPES.includes(type as Exclude<DrinkType, "water">)
    72	}
    73	
    74	export function getDrinkPreset(drinkType: DrinkType): DrinkPreset {
    75	  return DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    76	}
    77	
    78	export function estimateCaffeineMg(drinkType: DrinkType, amountMl: number): number {
    79	  if (drinkType === "water") return 0
    80	  const preset = DRINK_PRESETS[drinkType]
    81	  const safeAmount = Math.max(1, amountMl)
    82	  return Math.max(0, Math.round(preset.baseCaffeineMg * (safeAmount / preset.baseAmountMl)))
    83	}
    84	
    85	export function inferDrinkTypeFromFoodItem(input: { name_fr: string; category_l1: string; category_l2: string | null }): DrinkType {
    86	  const name = input.name_fr.toLowerCase()
    87	  const category = `${input.category_l1 ?? ""} ${input.category_l2 ?? ""}`.toLowerCase()
    88	
    89	  if (input.category_l1 !== "drinks") return "water"
    90	  if (/espresso|expresso/.test(name)) return "espresso"
    91	  if (/lungo/.test(name)) return "lungo"
    92	  if (/(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(name) || /(th[eé]|tisane|infusion|rooibos|camomille)/.test(category)) return "tea"
    93	  if (/cafe|coffee|cappuccino|latte|macchiato|ristretto/.test(name)) return "coffee"
    94	  if (/chauds?/.test(category)) return "coffee"
    95	  return "water"
    96	}

CANDIDATE: lib/client/smart/nutritionAlerts.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type NutritionAlertCode =
     2	  | 'protein_low'
     3	  | 'carbs_limit'
     4	  | 'hydration_low'
     5	  | 'lunch_missing'
     6	
     7	export type NutritionAlertSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical'
     8	
     9	export type NutritionAlert = {
    10	  code: NutritionAlertCode
    11	  severity: NutritionAlertSeverity
    12	  title: string
    13	  body?: string
    14	  delta?: number
    15	}
    16	
    17	export type NutritionConsumed = {
    18	  kcal: number
    19	  protein_g: number
    20	  carbs_g: number
    21	  fat_g: number
    22	  water_ml: number
    23	  caffeine_mg?: number
    24	}
    25	
    26	export type NutritionInput = {
    27	  consumed: NutritionConsumed
    28	  target: NutritionConsumed
    29	  currentHour: number
    30	  hasLunchLog: boolean
    31	}
    32	
    33	export function computeNutritionAlerts(input: NutritionInput): NutritionAlert[] {
    34	  const alerts: NutritionAlert[] = []
    35	  const { consumed, target, currentHour, hasLunchLog } = input
    36	
    37	  // Rule 1: protein_low (warning) — after 14h, behind schedule
    38	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    39	    const expected = target.protein_g * (currentHour / 22)
    40	    const threshold = expected * 0.8
    41	    if (consumed.protein_g < threshold) {
    42	      const delta = Math.round(target.protein_g - consumed.protein_g)
    43	      alerts.push({
    44	        code: 'protein_low',
    45	        severity: 'warning',
    46	        title: 'PROTÉINES EN RETARD',
    47	        body: `il te reste ${delta}g pour atteindre ${target.protein_g}g`,
    48	        delta,
    49	      })
    50	    }
    51	  }
    52	
    53	  // Rule 2: carbs_limit (critical) — over target
    54	  if (consumed.carbs_g > target.carbs_g) {
    55	    const delta = Math.round(consumed.carbs_g - target.carbs_g)
    56	    alerts.push({
    57	      code: 'carbs_limit',
    58	      severity: 'critical',
    59	      title: 'LIMITE GLUCIDES ATTEINTE',
    60	      body: `-${delta}g sur ta cible`,
    61	      delta,
    62	    })
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  // Rule 3: hydration_low (warning) — after 14h, <50% of target
    66	  if (currentHour >= 14) {
    67	    const ratio = target.water_ml > 0 ? consumed.water_ml / target.water_ml : 1
    68	    if (ratio < 0.5) {
    69	      const deltaMl = target.water_ml - consumed.water_ml
    70	      const deltaL = (deltaMl / 1000).toFixed(1)
    71	      alerts.push({
    72	        code: 'hydration_low',
    73	        severity: 'warning',
    74	        title: 'HYDRATATION FAIBLE',
    75	        body: `il manque ${deltaL}L`,
    76	        delta: deltaMl,
    77	      })
    78	    }
    79	  }
    80	
    81	  // Rule 4: lunch_missing (info) — between 13-14h, no lunch log
    82	  if (currentHour >= 13 && currentHour < 15 && !hasLunchLog) {
    83	    alerts.push({
    84	      code: 'lunch_missing',
    85	      severity: 'info',
    86	      title: 'PAS DE DÉJEUNER LOGUÉ',
    87	    })
    88	  }
    89	
    90	  return alerts
    91	}

------------------------------------------------------------
CANDIDATE: lib/client/smart/waterAggregation.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	export type WaterLog = {
     2	  logged_at: string
     3	  amount_ml: number
     4	}
     5	
     6	export type WaterByTimeOfDay = {
     7	  morning: number
     8	  midday: number
     9	  afternoon: number
    10	  evening: number
    11	}
    12	
    13	function getHourInTz(iso: string, tz = 'Europe/Paris'): number {
    14	  const d = new Date(iso)
    15	  const fmt = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', {
    16	    timeZone: tz,
    17	    hour: 'numeric',
    18	    hour12: false,
    19	  })
    20	  const parts = fmt.formatToParts(d)
    21	  const h = parts.find(p => p.type === 'hour')?.value ?? '0'
    22	  return parseInt(h, 10)
    23	}
    24	
    25	export function groupWaterByTimeOfDay(
    26	  logs: WaterLog[],
    27	  tz: string = 'Europe/Paris'
    28	): WaterByTimeOfDay {
    29	  const out: WaterByTimeOfDay = { morning: 0, midday: 0, afternoon: 0, evening: 0 }
    30	  for (const log of logs) {
    31	    const hour = getHourInTz(log.logged_at, tz)
    32	    if (hour >= 5 && hour < 12) out.morning += log.amount_ml
    33	    else if (hour >= 12 && hour < 15) out.midday += log.amount_ml
    34	    else if (hour >= 15 && hour < 19) out.afternoon += log.amount_ml
    35	    else if (hour >= 19 && hour < 24) out.evening += log.amount_ml
    36	  }
    37	  return out
    38	}

     1	export type NutritionDataMode = "bilan" | "realtime";
     2	
     3	export type NutritionSignalCategory =
     4	  | "structural"
     5	  | "dynamic"
     6	  | "hybrid";
     7

     9	  | "assessment"
    10	  | "checkin"
    11	  | "manual_override"
    12	  | "profile"
    13	  | "derived";
    14	
    15	export type NutritionSignalKey =
    16	  | "weight_kg"
    17	  | "height_cm"
    18	  | "body_fat_pct"
    19	  | "lean_mass_kg"
    20	  | "muscle_mass_kg"
    21	  | "visceral_fat_level"
    22	  | "bmr_kcal_measured"
    23	  | "weekly_frequency"
    24	  | "session_duration_min"
    25	  | "training_calories_weekly"
    26	  | "daily_steps"
    27	  | "cardio_frequency"
    28	  | "cardio_duration_min"

    36	  | "occupation_multiplier";
    37

    47	  bilan: {

    51	  };
    52	};

    70	    },
    71	  },
    72	  height_cm: {

    77	    realtime: { enabled: false, windowDays: null },
    78	    bilan: {

    82	    },
    83	  },

    90	    bilan: {

    92	      allowAnchoredRealtimeOverlay: false,
    93	      overlayWindowDays: null,
    94	    },
    95	  },
    96	  lean_mass_kg: {
    97	    category: "structural",
    98	    calculationRole: "Protein ratios",
    99	    defaultSource: "assessment",
   100	    fallbackSources: ["manual_override", "derived"],
   101	    realtime: { enabled: false, windowDays: null },
   102	    bilan: {
   103	      useSelectedBilan: true,
   104	      allowAnchoredRealtimeOverlay: false,

   313	
   314	export function getNutritionSignalGovernance(key: NutritionSignalKey) {
   315	  return NUTRITION_SIGNAL_GOVERNANCE[key];
   316	}
   317	
   318	export function getNutritionSignalWindowDays(
   319	  key: NutritionSignalKey,
   320	  mode: NutritionDataMode,
   321	): number | null {
   322	  const governance = getNutritionSignalGovernance(key);
   323	  return mode === "realtime"
   324	    ? governance.realtime.windowDays
   325	    : governance.bilan.overlayWindowDays;
   326	}
   327	
   328	export function canUseRealtimeSignal(
   329	  key: NutritionSignalKey,
   330	  mode: NutritionDataMode,
   331	): boolean {
   332	  const governance = getNutritionSignalGovernance(key);
   333	  return mode === "realtime"
   334	    ? governance.realtime.enabled
   335	    : governance.bilan.allowAnchoredRealtimeOverlay;
   336	}
   337	
   338	export function getNutritionSignalSourceLabel(
   339	  key: NutritionSignalKey,
   340	  mode: NutritionDataMode,
   341	  dataSource?: "selected" | "fallback" | "manual",
   342	): string {
   343	  if (dataSource === "manual") {
   344	    return "saisie manuelle";
   345	  }
   346	  if (dataSource === "fallback") {
   347	    return mode === "realtime" ? "dernier bilan" : "valeur héritée";
   348	  }
   349	  if (mode === "realtime") {
   350	    if (key === "weight_kg") return "mesure récente";
   351	    if (
   352	      key === "daily_steps" ||
   353	      key === "sleep_duration_h" ||
   354	      key === "sleep_quality" ||
   355	      key === "stress_level" ||
   356	      key === "energy_level"
   357	    ) {
   358	      return "moyenne récente";
   359	    }
   360	    if (key === "bmr_kcal_measured") return "mesure ancienne";
   361	    return canUseRealtimeSignal(key, mode) ? "temps réel" : "base stable";
   362	  }
   363	  return "bilan";
   364	}
   365	
   366	export function getNutritionSignalLabel(key: NutritionSignalKey): string {
   367	  const labels: Record<NutritionSignalKey, string> = {
   368	    weight_kg: "poids",
   369	    height_cm: "taille",
   370	    body_fat_pct: "masse grasse",
   371	    lean_mass_kg: "masse maigre",
   372	    muscle_mass_kg: "masse musculaire",
   373	    visceral_fat_level: "graisse viscérale",
   374	    bmr_kcal_measured: "métabolisme de base",
   375	    weekly_frequency: "fréquence d'entraînement",
   376	    session_duration_min: "durée des séances",
   377	    training_calories_weekly: "calories d'entraînement",
   378	    daily_steps: "nombre de pas",
   379	    cardio_frequency: "fréquence cardio",
   380	    cardio_duration_min: "durée cardio",
   381	    sleep_duration_h: "durée de sommeil",
   382	    sleep_quality: "qualité du sommeil",
   383	    stress_level: "niveau de stress",
   384	    energy_level: "niveau d'énergie",
   385	    caffeine_daily_mg: "caféine",
   386	    alcohol_weekly: "alcool",
   387	    work_hours_per_week: "temps de travail",
   388	    occupation_multiplier: "activité quotidienne",
   389	  };
   390	
   391	  return labels[key];
   392	}
