    71	/** Profil pour scaling portions anatomiques */
    72	export interface PortionScalingProfile {
    73	  hand_length_cm?: number | null
    74	  height_cm?: number | null
    75	}
    76	
    77	export interface PortionSize {
    78	  key: string
    79	  label: string
    80	  baseG: number
    81	  /** 'hand' = scale avec longueur main user, 'fixed' = ustensile/unité produit, taille constante */
    82	  scales: "hand" | "fixed"
    83	  description: string
    84	}
    85	
    86	/**
    87	 * Portions visuelles standard.
    88	 * Référence main adulte: 18cm (longueur poignet → bout majeur).
    89	 * Anatomique (paume/poing/pouce) → scale × (handCm / 18).
    90	 * Fixed (cuillère/verre/œuf) → constant.
    91	 */
    92	export const PORTION_SIZES: PortionSize[] = [
    93	  // Anatomiques (scale hand)
    94	  { key: "palm",            label: "Paume",                baseG: 100, scales: "hand",  description: "Viande, poisson (sans doigts)" },
    95	  { key: "half-palm",       label: "Demi-paume",           baseG: 50,  scales: "hand",  description: "Petits snacks, fromage tranché" },
    96	  { key: "fist",            label: "Poing fermé",          baseG: 150, scales: "hand",  description: "Féculents cuits" },
    97	  { key: "fist-dry",        label: "Poing (féculents secs)", baseG: 50,  scales: "hand",  description: "Riz/pâtes crus, flocons" },
    98	  { key: "thumb",           label: "Pouce entier",         baseG: 15,  scales: "hand",  description: "Lipides denses, fromage" },

   100	  { key: "cupped-hands",    label: "Deux mains en coupe",  baseG: 50,  scales: "hand",  description: "Légumes feuilles" },
   101	  { key: "bowl-hands",      label: "Bol mains jointes",    baseG: 250, scales: "hand",  description: "Céréales, soupes" },
   102	  // Fixed (ustensiles + unités produit)
   103	  { key: "tbsp",            label: "Cuillère à soupe",     baseG: 12,  scales: "fixed", description: "Huiles, sauces" },
   104	  { key: "tbsp-heaped",     label: "Cuillère bombée",      baseG: 18,  scales: "fixed", description: "Beurre noix, compote" },
   105	  { key: "tsp",             label: "Cuillère à café",      baseG: 4,   scales: "fixed", description: "Condiments, épices" },
   106	  { key: "plate",           label: "Assiette standard",    baseG: 300, scales: "fixed", description: "Légumes cuits" },
   107	  { key: "bread-slice",     label: "Tranche de pain",      baseG: 35,  scales: "fixed", description: "Pain standard" },
   108	  { key: "egg-medium",      label: "Œuf moyen",            baseG: 55,  scales: "fixed", description: "Œuf entier moyen" },
   109	  { key: "glass",           label: "Verre standard",       baseG: 200, scales: "fixed", description: "Liquides (eau/lait/jus)" },
   110	]
   111	
   112	/** Référence adulte (longueur main poignet → majeur, cm) */
   113	export const REFERENCE_HAND_CM = 18.0
   114	/** Ratio Pheasant 2003 — longueur main ≈ taille × 0.108 */
   115	export const HEIGHT_TO_HAND_RATIO = 0.108
   116	/** Multiplicateurs disponibles dans l'UI (×1 à ×5) */
   117	export const PORTION_MULTIPLIERS = [1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5] as const
   118	
   119	/**
   120	 * Retourne longueur main estimée (cm) : override user → dérivée taille → défaut 18.
   121	 */
   122	export function resolveHandLengthCm(profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined): number {
   123	  if (!profile) return REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   124	  if (profile.hand_length_cm && profile.hand_length_cm > 0) return profile.hand_length_cm
   125	  if (profile.height_cm && profile.height_cm > 0) return profile.height_cm * HEIGHT_TO_HAND_RATIO
   126	  return REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   127	}
   128	
   129	/**
   130	 * Calcule grammes scalés d'une portion selon profil + multiplicateur.
   131	 * Multiplicateur appliqué après scaling main (×2 = deux fois la portion).
   132	 */
   133	export function getScaledPortionG(
   134	  portion: PortionSize,
   135	  profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined,
   136	  multiplier: number = 1
   137	): number {
   138	  const mult = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(multiplier, 10))
   139	  if (portion.scales === "fixed") return Math.round(portion.baseG * mult)
   140	  const handCm = resolveHandLengthCm(profile)
   141	  const factor = handCm / REFERENCE_HAND_CM
   142	  return Math.round(portion.baseG * factor * mult)
   143	}
   144	
   145	/** True si profil a override main explicite (badge UI "ajusté à ta main") */
   146	export function isHandOverrideSet(profile: PortionScalingProfile | null | undefined): boolean {
   147	  return !!(profile?.hand_length_cm && profile.hand_length_cm > 0)
   148	}
   149

   158	}

   178	  "autres-lipides": "Autres",
   179	  sauces: "Sauces & Condiments",
   180	  boissons: "Boissons",
   181	  divers: "Divers",
   182	  "snacks-sales": "Snacks salés",
   183	  "snacks-sucres": "Snacks & Sucreries",
   184	  "fast-food": "Fast-food",
   185	  // drinks subcategories
   186	  eau: "Eau & Hydratation",
   187	  chauds: "Boissons chaudes",
   188	  "jus-smoothies": "Jus & Smoothies",
   189	  "laits-vegetaux": "Laits végétaux",
   190	  "sports-drinks": "Boissons sportives",
   191	  alcools: "Alcools",
   192	}
   193	
   194	/** Calcule les macros d'une entrée depuis food_item + quantité */
   195	export function calcEntryMacros(
   196	  item: FoodItem,
   197	  quantity_g: number
   198	): Pick<NutritionEntry, "calories_kcal" | "protein_g" | "carbs_g" | "fat_g" | "fiber_g"> {
   199	  const factor = quantity_g / 100
   200	  const protein_g = Math.round(item.protein_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   201	  const carbs_g = Math.round(item.carbs_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   202	  const fat_g = Math.round(item.fat_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   203	  const fiber_g = Math.round(item.fiber_per_100g * factor * 10) / 10
   204	  return {
   205	    calories_kcal: computeMacroEnergy({ protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, fiber_g }),
   206	    protein_g,
   207	    carbs_g,
   208	    fat_g,
   209	    fiber_g,
   210	  }
   211	}
   212	
   213	/** Somme les macros d'une liste d'entrées draft */
   214	export function sumDraftMacros(entries: EntryDraft[]): {
   215	  calories: number
   216	  protein: number
   217	  carbs: number
   218	  fat: number
   219	  fiber: number
   220	} {
   221	  return entries.reduce(
   222	    (acc, e) => {
   223	      const m = calcEntryMacros(e.food_item, e.quantity_g)
   224	      return {
   225	        calories: Math.round((acc.calories + m.calories_kcal) * 10) / 10,
   226	        protein: Math.round((acc.protein + m.protein_g) * 10) / 10,
   227	        carbs: Math.round((acc.carbs + m.carbs_g) * 10) / 10,
   228	        fat: Math.round((acc.fat + m.fat_g) * 10) / 10,
   229	        fiber: Math.round((acc.fiber + m.fiber_g) * 10) / 10,
   230	      }
   231	    },
   232	    { calories: 0, protein: 0, carbs: 0, fat: 0, fiber: 0 }
   233	  )
   234	}

CANDIDATE: lib/nutrition/food-taxonomy.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { FoodItem } from "@/lib/nutrition/food-items"

     3	export type VisibleCategoryKey = "proteins" | "carbs" | "fats" | "vegetables" | "drinks" | "supplements"
     4	export type VisibleLeafKey =
     5	  | "chicken" | "beef" | "pork" | "turkey" | "fish" | "seafood" | "eggs" | "dairy-protein" | "plant-protein" | "charcuterie" | "other-proteins"
     6	  | "rice" | "pasta" | "bread" | "cereals" | "potatoes" | "legumes" | "fresh-fruits" | "dried-fruits" | "sweet-products" | "sweet-sauces"
     7	  | "oils" | "nuts-seeds" | "avocado-olives" | "butter-spreads" | "nut-butters" | "fatty-sauces"
     8	  | "leafy" | "cruciferous" | "roots" | "mediterranean" | "other-vegetables"
     9	  | "water" | "hot-drinks" | "juices-smoothies" | "sodas" | "plant-milks" | "sports-drinks" | "alcohol"
    10	  | "whey" | "gainers-bars" | "performance" | "other-supplements"
    11

   113	
   114	function normalizeText(value: string): string {
   115	  return value
   116	    .toLowerCase()
   117	    .normalize("NFD")
   118	    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, "")
   119	    .replace(/œ/g, "oe")
   120	    .replace(/æ/g, "ae")
   121	}
   122	
   123	function nameHasAny(item: Pick<FoodItem, "name_fr">, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   124	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   125	  return keywords.some((keyword) => name.includes(normalizeText(keyword)))
   126	}
   127	
   128	function hasAnyText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   129	  const text = normalizeText(value)
   130	  return keywords.some((keyword) => text.includes(normalizeText(keyword)))
   131	}
   132	
   133	function hasWordText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   134	  const text = ` ${normalizeText(value)} `
   135	  return keywords.some((keyword) => {
   136	    const normalized = normalizeText(keyword)
   137	    return normalized ? text.includes(` ${normalized} `) : false
   138	  })
   139	}
   140	
   141	function hasWordPrefixText(value: string, keywords: string[]): boolean {
   142	  const text = normalizeText(value)
   143	  return keywords.some((keyword) => {
   144	    const normalized = normalizeText(keyword)
   145	    return normalized ? text === normalized || text.startsWith(`${normalized} `) || text.includes(` ${normalized} `) : false
   146	  })
   147	}
   148	
   149	function isProteinFamilyHint(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   150	  return hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   151	    "poulet",
   152	    "chicken",
   153	    "dinde",
   154	    "turkey",
   155	    "boeuf",

   164	    "saucisse",

   274	
   275	function isSweetSauce(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   276	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   277	
   278	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   279	    "barre",
   280	    "biscuit",
   281	    "beignet",
   282	    "brioche",
   283	    "brownie",
   284	    "céréales",
   285	    "cereales",
   286	    "chocolat au lait",
   287	    "chocolat noir",
   288	    "chocolat blanc",
   289	    "cookie",
   290	    "gaufre",
   291	    "muffin",
   292	    "pétales",
   293	    "petales",
   294	    "pain au chocolat",
   295	    "pâtisserie",
   296	    "patisserie",
   297	    "tarte",
   298	    "rocher",
   299	    "sablé",
   300	    "sable"
   301	  ])) {
   302	    return false
   303	  }
   304	
   305	  return hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   306	    "ketchup",
   307	    "sauce barbecue",
   308	    "sauce bbq",
   309	    "sauce au chocolat",
   310	    "sirop",
   311	    "sirop d'agave",
   312	    "sirop d'érable",
   313	    "sirop d'erable",
   314	    "coulis",
   315	    "nappage",
   316	    "caramel liquide",
   317	    "miel",
   318	    "confiture"
   319	  ])
   320	}
   321	
   322	function isCompositeMeal(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   323	  return hasAnyText(item.name_fr, COMPOSITE_MEAL_BLOCKERS)
   324	}
   325	
   326	function isSweetProduct(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   327	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   328	
   329	  if (item.category_l2 === "snacks-sales" || item.category_l2 === "boissons" || item.category_l2 === "sauces") {
   330	    return false
   331	  }
   332	
   333	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   334	    "apéritif",
   335	    "aperitif",
   336	    "salé",
   337	    "sale",
   338	    "crackers",
   339	    "chips",
   340	    "eau minérale",
   341	    "eau minerale",
   342	    "boisson à l'eau",
   343	    "boisson a l'eau",
   344	    "boisson préparée",
   345	    "boisson preparee"
   346	  ])) {
   347	    return false
   348	  }
   349	
   350	  return SWEET_PRODUCT_TERMS.some((term) => name.includes(normalizeText(term)))
   351	    && !SWEET_SNACK_BLOCKERS.some((term) => name.includes(normalizeText(term)))
   352	}
   353	
   354	function isSpecificProtein(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   355	  return (
   356	    nameHasAny(item, ["poulet", "chicken", "dinde", "turkey"]) ||
   357	    nameHasAny(item, ["boeuf", "bœuf", "veau", "agneau", "mouton", "porc", "jambon", "lard", "bacon", "saucisse", "chorizo", "saucisson", "pancetta", "bresaola"]) ||
   358	    nameHasAny(item, ["poisson", "saumon", "thon", "sardine", "maquereau", "truite", "brochet", "cabillaud", "morue", "merlan", "hareng", "anchois", "anguille", "brème", "breme"]) || hasWordPrefixText(item.name_fr, ["bar"]) ||
   359	    nameHasAny(item, ["crabe", "araignee de mer", "araignée de mer", "homard", "langouste", "crevette", "moule", "huitre", "huître", "calamar", "seiche"]) ||
   360	    isEggFood(item) ||
   361	    nameHasAny(item, ["fromage", "yaourt", "skyr", "lait", "whey", "protéine", "protein"])
   362	  )
   363	}
   364	
   365	function isEggFood(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   366	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   367	  return /\boeufs?\b/.test(name) || name.includes("blanc d'oeuf") || name.includes("blanc d œuf")
   368	}
   369	
   370	function isFreshFruitFood(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   371	  return item.category_l1 === "fruits"
   372	    && isFruitFamilyHint(item)
   373	    && !nameHasAny(item, FRUIT_BLOCKERS)
   374	    && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   375	      "sec",
   376	      "sèche",
   377	      "seche",
   378	      "séchée",
   379	      "sechee",
   380	      "secs",
   381	      "sèches",
   382	      "seches",
   383	      "moelleux",
   384	      "réhydraté",
   385	      "rehydrate",
   386	      "compote",
   387	      "coulis",
   388	      "chips",
   389	      "confit",
   390	      "appertisé",
   391	      "appertise",
   392	      "sirop"
   393	    ])
   394	}
   395	
   396	function isDriedFruitFood(item: FoodItem): boolean {
   397	  const name = normalizeText(item.name_fr)
   398	
   399	  if (item.category_l1 !== "fruits") return false
   400	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["compote", "coulis", "chips", "sirop", "appertisé", "appertise"])) return false
   401	  if (hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["cru", "crue", "pulpe, cru", "pulpe, crue"])) {
   402	    return hasAnyText(item.name_fr, ["datte", "pruneau"])
   403	  }
   404	
   405	  return (
   406	    /\bsecs?\b/.test(name) ||
   407	    /\bseches?\b/.test(name) ||
   408	    name.includes("sechee") ||
   409	    name.includes("séché") ||
   410	    name.includes("seche") ||
   411	    hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   412	      "abricot sec",
   413	      "abricots secs",
   414	      "figue sèche",
   415	      "figue seche",
   416	      "figues sèches",
   417	      "figues seches",
   418	      "raisin sec",
   419	      "raisins secs",
   420	      "datte",
   421	      "dattes",
   422	      "pruneau",
   423	      "pruneaux",
   424	      "cranberry séchée",
   425	      "cranberry sechee",
   426	      "canneberge séchée",
   427	      "canneberge sechee"
   428	    ])
   429	  )
   430	}
   431	
   432	export function matchesVisibleLeaf(item: FoodItem, leaf: VisibleLeafKey): boolean {
   433	  switch (leaf) {
   434	    case "chicken":
   435	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   436	        && nameHasAny(item, ["poulet", "volaille"])
   437	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   438	          "chop suey",
   439	          "quenelle",
   440	          "saucisse",
   441	          "knack",
   442	          "rillettes",
   443	          "pâté",
   444	          "pate",
   445	          "confit de foie",
   446	          "préemballé",
   447	          "preemballe"
   448	        ])
   449	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   450	    case "beef":
   451	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   452	        && nameHasAny(item, ["boeuf", "bœuf", "veau"])
   453	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   454	          "boeuf aux carottes",
   455	          "bœuf aux carottes",
   456	          "bourguignon",
   457	          "blanquette",
   458	          "brick",
   459	          "fond de veau",
   460	          "boulette",
   461	          "farce",
   462	          "merguez",
   463	          "mouton",
   464	          "agneau",
   465	          "porc",
   466	          "meloukhia",
   467	          "plat à base",
   468	          "plat a base",
   469	          "sauce",
   470	          "préemballé",
   471	          "preemballe"
   472	        ])
   473	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   474	    case "pork":
   475	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   476	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   477	          "porc",
   478	          "filet mignon",
   479	          "bacon",
   480	          "lardon",
   481	          "lardons",
   482	          "jambon",
   483	          "échine",
   484	          "echine",
   485	          "palette",
   486	          "poitrine de porc",
   487	          "travers de porc"
   488	        ])
   489	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   490	          "boeuf",
   491	          "bœuf",
   492	          "veau",
   493	          "mouton",
   494	          "agneau",
   495	          "volaille",
   496	          "poulet",
   497	          "dinde",
   498	          "jambon de poulet",
   499	          "jambon de dinde",
   500	          "pélardon",
   501	          "pelardon",
   502	          "omelette",
   503	          "oeuf",
   504	          "œuf",
   505	          "gelée",
   506	          "gelee",
   507	          "merguez",
   508	          "mortadelle, porc et boeuf",
   509	          "farce",
   510	          "potée",
   511	          "potee",
   512	          "cassoulet",
   513	          "porc au caramel",
   514	          "saucisse",
   515	          "chair à saucisse",
   516	          "chair a saucisse",
   517	          "pâté",
   518	          "pate",
   519	          "rillettes",
   520	          "terrine",
   521	          "préemballé",
   522	          "preemballe"
   523	        ])
   524	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   525	    case "turkey":
   526	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins" && nameHasAny(item, ["dinde", "turkey"]) && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   527	    case "fish":
   528	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   529	        && item.category_l2 === "poissons"
   530	        && !matchesVisibleLeaf(item, "seafood")
   531	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   532	          "bigorneau",
   533	          "buccin",
   534	          "clam",
   535	          "palourde",
   536	          "praire",
   537	          "écrevisse",
   538	          "ecrevisse",
   539	          "escargot",
   540	          "moule",
   541	          "huître",
   542	          "huitre",
   543	          "crevette",
   544	          "crabe",
   545	          "calmar",
   546	          "calamar",
   547	          "encornet",
   548	          "poulpe",
   549	          "homard",
   550	          "langouste",
   551	          "sauce",
   552	          "quenelle",
   553	          "salade",
   554	          "beignet",
   555	          "brandade",
   556	          "gratin",
   557	          "préemballé",
   558	          "preemballe"
   559	        ])
   560	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   561	    case "seafood":
   562	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   563	        && item.category_l2 === "poissons"
   564	        && nameHasAny(item, [
   565	          "crevette",
   566	          "crabe",
   567	          "moule",
   568	          "huître",
   569	          "huitre",
   570	          "calmar",
   571	          "calamar",
   572	          "encornet",
   573	          "poulpe",
   574	          "homard",
   575	          "langouste",
   576	          "coquille saint-jacques",
   577	          "saint jacques",
   578	          "bigorneau",
   579	          "buccin",
   580	          "clam",
   581	          "palourde",
   582	          "praire",
   583	          "écrevisse",
   584	          "ecrevisse"
   585	        ])
   586	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   587	          "beignet",
   588	          "à la romaine",
   589	          "a la romaine",
   590	          "rillettes",
   591	          "sauce",
   592	          "escabèche",
   593	          "escabeche",
   594	          "préemballé",
   595	          "preemballe"
   596	        ])
   597	        && !isCompositeMeal(item)
   598	    case "eggs":
   599	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   600	        && item.category_l2 === "oeufs"
   601	        && nameHasAny(item, ["oeuf", "œuf", "oeufs", "œufs", "omelette"])
   602	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   603	          "crème",
   604	          "creme",
   605	          "flan",
   606	          "pâtissier",
   607	          "patissier",
   608	          "tarte",
   609	          "gâteau",
   610	          "gateau",
   611	          "biscuit",
   612	          "dessert",
   613	          "pommes",
   614	          "garniture farine",
   615	          "lardons",
   616	          "jambon",
   617	          "viande",
   618	          "pommes de terre",
   619	          "tortilla",
   620	          "garnitures diverses",
   621	          "pâtes",
   622	          "pates",
   623	          "nouilles"
   624	        ])
   625	    case "dairy-protein":
   626	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   627	        && item.category_l2 === "laitiers"
   628	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   629	          "fromage de tête",
   630	          "fromage de tete",
   631	          "omelette",
   632	          "mousse au chocolat",
   633	          "dessert végétal",
   634	          "dessert vegetal"
   635	        ])
   636	    case "plant-protein":
   637	      return item.category_l1 === "proteins"
   638	        && (
   639	          item.category_l2 === "vegetales"
   640	          || nameHasAny(item, ["tofu", "tempeh", "seitan", "protéine de soja", "proteine de soja", "soja texturé", "soja texture", "bouchées végétales", "bouchees vegetales", "émincé végétal", "emince vegetal"])
   641	        )
   642	        && !hasAnyText(item.name_fr, [
   643	          "dessert",
   644	          "fromage",
   645	          "tartiner",
   646	          "sucré",
   647	          "sucre",
   648	          "aromatisé",
   649	          "aromatise"
   650	        ])
   651	    case "charcuterie":

------------------------------------------------------------
CANDIDATE: lib/nutrition/voice.ts
------------------------------------------------------------
     1	import type { CategoryL1, MealType } from './food-items'
     2	
     3	export type VoiceConfidence = 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'
     4	
     5	export interface VoiceItem {
     6	  name: string
     7	  quantity_g: number
     8	  kcal: number
     9	  protein_g: number
    10	  carbs_g: number
    11	  fat_g: number
    12	  fiber_g: number
    13	  confidence: VoiceConfidence
    14	  food_item_id?: string
    15	  is_new: boolean
    16	  category_l1?: CategoryL1
    17	  category_l2?: string
    18	}
    19	
    20	export interface VoiceParseResult {
    21	  items: VoiceItem[]
    22	  meal_type: MealType
    23	  raw_transcript: string
    24	  clean_transcript: string
    25	}
    26	
    27	// ── Filler word maps ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    28	const FILLERS: Record<string, RegExp> = {
    29	  // Use (?:^|\s) / (?=\s|$) for accented words that break \b word boundaries
    30	  fr: /(?:^|\s)(?:euh|donc|voil[aà]|en fait|genre|alors|bon|ben)(?=\s|$)/gi,
    31	  en: /\b(um|uh|so|like|well|you know)\b/gi,
    32	  es: /(?:^|\s)(?:eh|bueno|pues|o sea)(?=\s|$)/gi,
    33	}
    34	
    35	// ── Written numbers → digits (French) ───────────────────────────────────────
    36	const FR_NUMBERS: Array<[RegExp, string]> = [
    37	  [/\bmille\b/gi, '1000'],
    38	  [/\bcinq cents\b/gi, '500'],
    39	  [/\bquatre cents\b/gi, '400'],
    40	  [/\btrois cents\b/gi, '300'],
    41	  [/\bdeux cents\b/gi, '200'],
    42	  [/\bcent cinquante\b/gi, '150'],
    43	  [/\bcent\b/gi, '100'],
    44	  [/\bquatre-vingt-dix\b/gi, '90'],
    45	  [/\bquatre-vingts?\b/gi, '80'],
    46	  [/\bsoixante-dix\b/gi, '70'],
    47	  [/\bsoixante\b/gi, '60'],
    48	  [/\bciquante\b/gi, '50'],
    49	  [/\bquarante\b/gi, '40'],
    50	  [/\btrente\b/gi, '30'],
    51	  [/\bvingt\b/gi, '20'],
    52	  [/\bdix\b/gi, '10'],
    53	  [/\bneuf\b/gi, '9'],
    54	  [/\bhuit\b/gi, '8'],
    55	  [/\bsept\b/gi, '7'],
    56	  [/\bsix\b/gi, '6'],
    57	  [/\bcinq\b/gi, '5'],
    58	  [/\bquatre\b/gi, '4'],
    59	  [/\btrois\b/gi, '3'],
    60	  [/\bdeux\b/gi, '2'],
    61	  [/\bun\b/gi, '1'],
    62	  [/\bune demi\b/gi, '0.5'],
    63	  [/\bun quart\b/gi, '0.25'],
    64	]
    65	
    66	// ── Unit normalizations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67	const UNITS: Array<[RegExp, string]> = [
    68	  [/\bkilogrammes?\b/gi, 'kg'],
    69	  [/\bgrammes?\b/gi, 'g'],
    70	  [/\bmillilitres?\b/gi, 'ml'],
    71	  [/\bcentilitres?\b/gi, 'cl'],
    72	  [/\blitres?\b/gi, 'L'],
    73	]
    74	
    75	export function cleanTranscript(raw: string, lang: string): string {
    76	  let text = raw.toLowerCase()
    77	
    78	  const fillerRe = FILLERS[lang] ?? FILLERS['fr']
    79	  text = text.replace(fillerRe, '')
    80	
    81	  if (lang === 'fr') {
    82	    for (const [re, digit] of FR_NUMBERS) {
    83	      text = text.replace(re, digit)
    84	    }
    85	  }
    86	
    87	  for (const [re, abbr] of UNITS) {
    88	    text = text.replace(re, abbr)
    89	  }
    90	
    91	  return text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()
    92	}
    93	
    94	type VoiceCategorySuggestion = {
    95	  category_l1: CategoryL1
    96	  category_l2: string
    97	}
    98	
    99	const VOICE_CATEGORY_PATTERNS: Array<{
   100	  category_l1: CategoryL1
   101	  category_l2: string
   102	  patterns: RegExp[]
   103	}> = [
   104	  {
   105	    category_l1: "drinks",
   106	    category_l2: "eau",
   107	    patterns: [/\beau\b/i, /\bwater\b/i, /\bperrier\b/i, /\bsan pellegrino\b/i],
   108	  },
   109	  {
   110	    category_l1: "drinks",
   111	    category_l2: "chauds",
   112	    patterns: [/\bcafe\b/i, /\bcafé\b/i, /\bth[eé]\b/i, /\binfusion\b/i],
   113	  },
   114	  {
   115	    category_l1: "drinks",
   116	    category_l2: "jus-smoothies",
   117	    patterns: [/\bjus\b/i, /\bsmoothie\b/i, /\bshake\b/i],
   118	  },
   119	  {
   120	    category_l1: "drinks",
   121	    category_l2: "laits-vegetaux",
   122	    patterns: [/\blait\b/i, /\bsoy\b/i, /\bavoine\b/i, /\bamande\b/i],
   123	  },
   124	  {
   125	    category_l1: "fruits",
   126	    category_l2: "frais",
   127	    patterns: [/\bpomme\b/i, /\bbanane\b/i, /\bkiwi\b/i, /\bfraise\b/i, /\bframboise\b/i, /\borange\b/i],
   128	  },
   129	  {
   130	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   131	    category_l2: "feuilles",
   132	    patterns: [/\bsalade\b/i, /\bepinard\b/i, /\bépinard\b/i, /\broquette\b/i, /\blaitue\b/i],
   133	  },
   134	  {
   135	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   136	    category_l2: "cruciferes",
   137	    patterns: [/\bbrocoli\b/i, /\bchou\b/i, /\bchoux\b/i, /\bchou-fleur\b/i],
   138	  },
   139	  {
   140	    category_l1: "vegetables",
   141	    category_l2: "autres-legumes",
   142	    patterns: [/\bcarotte\b/i, /\bcourgette\b/i, /\btomate\b/i, /\bpoivron\b/i, /\bconcombre\b/i],
   143	  },
   144	  {
   145	    category_l1: "proteins",
   146	    category_l2: "oeufs",
   147	    patterns: [/\boeuf\b/i, /\bœuf\b/i, /\bomelette\b/i],
   148	  },
   149	  {
   150	    category_l1: "proteins",
   151	    category_l2: "viandes",
   152	    patterns: [/\bpoulet\b/i, /\bdinde\b/i, /\bsteak\b/i, /\bboeuf\b/i, /\bbœuf\b/i, /\bjambon\b/i],
   153	  },
   154	  {
   155	    category_l1: "proteins",
   156	    category_l2: "poissons",
   157	    patterns: [/\bsaumon\b/i, /\bthon\b/i, /\btruite\b/i, /\bcrevette\b/i, /\bpoisson\b/i],
   158	  },
   159	  {
   160	    category_l1: "proteins",
   161	    category_l2: "laitiers",
   162	    patterns: [/\byaourt\b/i, /\bskyr\b/i, /\bfromage blanc\b/i, /\bfromage\b/i],
   163	  },
   164	  {
   165	    category_l1: "carbs",
   166	    category_l2: "cereales",
   167	    patterns: [/\briz\b/i, /\bavoine\b/i, /\bquinoa\b/i, /\bsemoule\b/i, /\bcereale\b/i],
   168	  },
   169	  {
   170	    category_l1: "carbs",
   171	    category_l2: "fecules",
   172	    patterns: [/\bpomme de terre\b/i, /\bpates?\b/i, /\bpâtes?\b/i, /\bgnocchi\b/i],
   173	  },
   174	  {
   175	    category_l1: "carbs",
   176	    category_l2: "pain",
   177	    patterns: [/\bpain\b/i, /\btortilla\b/i, /\bwrap\b/i, /\bbaguette\b/i],
   178	  },
   179	  {
   180	    category_l1: "carbs",
   181	    category_l2: "legumineuses",
   182	    patterns: [/\blentille\b/i, /\bpois chiche\b/i, /\bharicot\b/i, /\bpois\b/i],
   183	  },
   184	  {
   185	    category_l1: "fats",
   186	    category_l2: "huiles",
   187	    patterns: [/\bhuile\b/i, /\bhuile d'?olive\b/i],
   188	  },
   189	  {
   190	    category_l1: "fats",
   191	    category_l2: "noix-graines",
   192	    patterns: [/\bamande\b/i, /\bnoix\b/i, /\bgraines?\b/i, /\bcajou\b/i, /\bnoisette\b/i],
   193	  },
   194	  {
   195	    category_l1: "fats",
   196	    category_l2: "autres-lipides",
   197	    patterns: [/\bavocat\b/i, /\bbeurre\b/i, /\bpur[eé]e d'amande\b/i, /\bpeanut butter\b/i],
   198	  },
   199	]
   200	
   201	export function guessVoiceFoodCategory(name: string): VoiceCategorySuggestion | null {
   202	  const label = name.trim().toLowerCase()
   203	  if (!label) return null
   204	
   205	  for (const group of VOICE_CATEGORY_PATTERNS) {
   206	    if (group.patterns.some((pattern) => pattern.test(label))) {
   207	      return {
   208	        category_l1: group.category_l1,
   209	        category_l2: group.category_l2,
   210	      }
   211	    }
   212	  }
   213	
   214	  return null
   215	}
